name: The Franken Crew
subject: Our virtual town hall was a success!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
It was great so see so many of you on Saturday morning, Crew. For our first Virtual Town Hall, over 160 folks from all over Iowa showed up to chat with Mike. We got into some topics th
|
---
| |
---

| | It was great to see so many of you on Saturday morning, Crew. For our first Virtual Town Hall, over 160 folks from all over Iowa showed up to chat with Mike. We got into some topics that you are concerned about -- from the admiral's plan to combat COVID-19 to fighting climate change to ensuring rural Iowa has broadband internet access. **We plan on hosting these Virtual Town Halls often -- and our next event will be on Thursday at 4 PM CST, specifically about COVID-19.** **If you can join us,[_click here, RSVP, and send Mike a question in advance._](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2489/33365068/4a6aeac9/3f8bed0a/3160169489/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/s/covid-virtual-town-hall") If you can't join us, but you still want to support the Admiral, _[click here and chip in $5 or $10 if you can.](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2489/33365068/4a6aeac9/3f8bed0b/3160169489/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200326_covidvth_em_fr_all_l1")_** | [RSVP >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2489/33365068/4a6aeac9/3f8bed04/3160169489/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/s/covid-virtual-town-hall")
---
[Chip In >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2489/33365068/4a6aeac9/3f8bed05/3160169489/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200326_covidvth_em_fr_all_btn")
---
We understand that not everyone can make it, so if you can't join on Thursday, there will be other opportunities. In the meantime, you should join our Facebook group, Iowans for Franken.
[Join the Facebook Crew >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2489/33365068/4a6aeac9/3f8bed06/3160169489/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://www.facebook.com/groups/iowansforfranken/?source_id=110022477032429")
---
Thank you, and see you Thursday!
The Franken Crew

[DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2489/33365068/4a6aeac9/3f8bed07/3160169489/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200326_covidvth_em_fr_all_ftr")
---

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: re: stop the partisan politics on coronavirus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
The Democrats are playing politics with YOUR lives and livelihoods. [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=1f61cc22d1014b7a904dad2847e68452&_e=YoiN_cg3nIIFwIrVxGsAQe7ANxQyNxCzCudt9OKxUBg-KDwAkMO2jsH-8s2jQqGzYFKU8mKRjEoyVEXpl6HW5_SM6OZsfr7q283rBIXzC8ohIBbjOfeWuyBYMyIyQxudYm_CYF5IYTESGZby3N-UPSNhZJagxw3xWdkDt93JbxnazXfbyJluHlqsSAPpVq0YJB_LbwVtKTibCqEttp7EdvtCsPE24fjETUznS2zbnuIdcOgwXT6BdTc8j6AifGyKcEk4vtx356kJnSZ8SxUhl8TNZqPqCI3mJaThKBbMN0OwTgGC2LdfpX1VTj8sbJMUwqW7Q5BW446WDiDEcFCztuj-5R4Ss1e4bu0cHnEn6VM9ienK5Fqd3Sb6PJUz1MuTM7SLSefm2VBtMHA8t5YFY0R8NXTmmECn0c7BgzijgwktGHJSWuOo2UEuEXKEUCsg_0BTUB_ww59Xqf2XQVJsVZnx1BdbDdwrD3P7hvxgEpE%3D) | |
---
Peter,

The Democrats are playing politics with YOUR lives and livelihoods.
With conservatives hard at work to pass a relief bill for the people, hospitals, and small businesses suffering through the Coronavirus crisis, Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer and their allies are doing everything they can to interfere, obstruct, and defeat the efforts.

**This is NOT the time for their radical tactics - our families and our businesses are at stake! I want you to join me today to tell these liberals it's time to get to work to help the American people.**
[ **ADD YOUR NAME: Sign the petition >>** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=1f61cc22d1014b7a904dad2847e68452&_e=YoiN_cg3nIIFwIrVxGsAQe7ANxQyNxCzCudt9OKxUBg-KDwAkMO2jsH-8s2jQqGzYFKU8mKRjEoyVEXpl6HW5_SM6OZsfr7q283rBIXzC8ohIBbjOfeWuyBYMyIyQxudYm_CYF5IYTESGZby3N-UPSNhZJagxw3xWdkDt93JbxnazXfbyJluHlqsSAPpVq0YJB_LbwVtKTibCqEttp7EdvtCsPE24fjETUznS2zbnuIdcOgwXT6BdTc8j6AifGyKcEk4vtx356kJnSZ8SxUhl10GgqYisW-tn6JnOkMwtCQla52SU2N6NCHAROjgzydYtaOCKCXTsRm5NDedsAeqDYewiTGjxt2URdiRKQuLNIB7N48dxiiKUNvHsDOtDh3SXP6uaMTKR1vkg6Qb2bvbBtm2X8cL2_bCKgNYkXnqk_SIp1Qz17pgabaxITcvNYlkn5BtSIzyYKINsJwFAmG8fasfTWe0PX8It8SM0HAcM48%3D)
Peter, you wouldn't believe the things Democrats are considering a "priority" right now!

The Pelosi Left Wing Wish Bill has:
* Expansive handouts for solar and wind energy.
* New emissions standards for airlines and requirement of full offset by 2025 - just like the Green New Deal wanted!
* Huge carve outs for Big Labor.
* Required same-day voter registration and early voting for EVERY state.
* Bailouts for the U.S. Postal Service, for the union pension fund, and for student loans.
* Retirement plans for employees of liberal pet projects.
* Virtue signaling publication of corporate pay rates by race and diversity requirements for all corporate boards.
* A requirement for job-destroying $15/hr minimum wage.
* $1 billion in “Cash For Clunkers”-style program where government buys planes from airlines.
* $1.5 million to study climate change.
* New burdensome OSHA requirements for hospitals.
* $1 billion for new Obamaphones.

What does any of **THAT** have to do with Coronavirus? _**[SIGN THE PETITION>>](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=1f61cc22d1014b7a904dad2847e68452&_e=YoiN_cg3nIIFwIrVxGsAQe7ANxQyNxCzCudt9OKxUBg-KDwAkMO2jsH-8s2jQqGzYFKU8mKRjEoyVEXpl6HW5za-BZ4uosOL5GOHJitoyVfg9I1a1jf2Xy6UYir5nhSWr13r9z8yRxSSan5D6HMU-YyhatuGt7AXEryqvO6_NGghnCOCvyLqyu650tNFzkmVmeuCBS_5tgY9jlCNMjheUzkleS1rScisrkTRN382_7H5GB78bKQxSOtjOKZ8RWopoU0NhnYU1kmnTDIRenGvpXwwVNy4kLpJKsRUUN45vfCtxdqlBN-HV-Eya5zKQ2lXVWjD4lJoV8pzNAgb1OXLcVeiv59c7W3dAelS3El4ndTca_IfpAT_reZ6Vtsy9U3hyN0QNwusci80wynTuLrZs0sELEzICN_htCYDnNxlUNBBc7BK656RTsTCY0iuXUWz2e9W-aDMvqORPovOImovmwPSBPL3QQ5EUSocq_bv5ak%3D)****

**_
**With our hospitals and health providers fearing the worst and our small businesses struggling to keep the books open under the pressure of the shutdowns, this is UNACCEPTABLE.**

In the state of New York, we're dealing with nearly 25,000 cases of Coronavirus and millions of dollars lost for business. We cannot afford these distraction tactics.

_We must stand up and tell these radicals it's time to end these partisan games and help the people. _

Join me today by adding your name: **[https://secure.winred.com/tenney-for-congress/covid-1101991/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=1f61cc22d1014b7a904dad2847e68452&_e=YoiN_cg3nIIFwIrVxGsAQe7ANxQyNxCzCudt9OKxUBg-KDwAkMO2jsH-8s2jQqGzYFKU8mKRjEoyVEXpl6HW5za-BZ4uosOL5GOHJitoyVfg9I1a1jf2Xy6UYir5nhSWr13r9z8yRxSSan5D6HMU-YyhatuGt7AXEryqvO6_NGghnCOCvyLqyu650tNFzkmVmeuCBS_5tgY9jlCNMjheUzkleS1rScisrkTRN382_7H5GB78bKQxSOtjOKZ8RWopoU0NhnYU1kmnTDIRenGvpRaRNtYohVtcWpI50BxTlHu4L2lumDddPPm2ntTNesnNxGGmI6aeyEzUjma0FLTWHo7s70OkIRCJ5kEalQcRLPLWeDSfFIweWtPtHVh92Qdig5b4eSL9mq-tCV5bKO8N1z2lt_crmMjLkuIooM0PRxk4lw93gwd_cr-QcvU0zNnRWeTd9BL8_-X66waogKGe719Bsy2rbVDeEc4hufS1bFo%3D)**

-Claudia

name: M.E. Smith for Team Hick
subject: In exactly one week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- I know how difficult this time is for so many people in our state and across the country. So before I go any further, _thank you for opening this email._ Just knowing that we have your support is enough. But to be frank, our very first FEC filing deadline of this election year is in exactly one week. So in a minute, I'm going to ask you to add a donation to our campaign -- but please, only pitch in if you can afford to do so -- I really mean that. Time and again, Republican Senator Cory Gardner has sided with his wealthy friends over the people he was elected to serve. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their special interests buddies will do whatever it takes to save his seat. **But their mountains of cash can 't hide the truth: Cory Gardner is one of the most unpopular Senators up for re-election and the polls show John Hickenlooper beating him come November.** We can win this race, folks, but it's going to take all of us who are able, coming together and building a campaign that can fight back against the GOP's dark money machine. That's why I'm turning to you: **Can our team count on you to add a donation of $10 or more before our critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline? I wouldn 't ask if it wasn't important.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200324-me?refcode=em-200324-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---

---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200324-me?refcode=em-200324-full&amount=50&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200324-me?refcode=em-200324-full&amount=100&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200324-me?refcode=em-200324-full&amount=250&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200324-me?refcode=em-200324-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
Like I said, only pitch in if you can afford to do so. John knows that the most important thing you can do right now is take care of yourself and your loved ones.
No matter what, we're so grateful to have you on the team.
-- M.E.
M.E. Smith
Campaign Manager
Team Hick
P.S. We know this is a difficult time, so please take care of yourself and your loved ones and only pitch in if you can afford to do so. To pause our emails until this public health emergency has passed, [fill out this form](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637710ff/691c9bd/68455fdf/11a76516/2999641151/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://jhfp.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/covid-19?source=em200324").

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: The whole purpose of "Hunker Down, Hoosiers"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
We’re in this fight together. And together, we’ll win this war against COVID-19. | | |
---|---|---
Friend,

Yesterday, we told you about Governor Holcomb’s latest actions to limit the spread of the coronavirus and save Hoosier lives.

**_He had a simple message in these complicated times – “Hunker down, Hoosiers.”_**

And today he told us stories about the Hoosier character and spirit:
* It’s the Hoosier who anonymously donated 150 face masks to the Indiana State Department of Health. They said, “‘I don't want anything. I don't want recognition. I don't want to be paid. I want to help.”

* It’s the uniformed police officers in Southport making runs for the elderly, making sure they get food and medicine.

* It’s a refurbished school bus in Plainfield delivering meals.

* It’s the casino in Hammond that quickly donated all of its perishable food to community programs.

* It’s a community partnership in New Albany that’s helping restaurant workers who are temporarily out of work.

* And it’s every ordinary Hoosier who is stepping up, staying home, and saving lives.

**These stories are the whole purpose of “Hunker down, Hoosiers.” It’s about fighting back.**

We’re in this fight together. And together, we’ll win this war against COVID-19.

_**“We're acting now. Fighting back. That’s the whole purpose of hunker down Hoosiers. It's to make sure we get through this storm as fast as humanly possible.” – Gov. Holcomb**_

Thanks,
-Your Holcomb Crew

P.S. In case you missed today’s press conference, here are a few of Governor Holcomb’s latest actions he shared --
* Helping homeless populations: **[Learn more here](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=e075677d1fc84a92ad629de380f078ec&_e=wsK0_y2nr4ms0cHUj8K74SNslwOmiMfUm2m-ASDpj3zlH6PoakflGZQ3-o_B_-LXJkPAPaK8r2-GlYIkMj-ogvJ-tSoy1Qxwp--xFVwX7TsP09nbZbhuwMrLV639khZ3qGAKlt2nRh6Q175GbLJgx5J0VinoCY5qF1vCTsLUHhuKKEPvwm7vvTyhd4fusXsN7D4mE9O4hFjXf6Jm1YtLhajyQiAGYX6b4Dbhf8qdEYsCsLxDzCCay8cjZBogEBCHhT7v2QHhQ6M6EiTILLQK9VrdvlV-WelKlwNPaOuWQC80jLDvleqiGTg3lsCLzEShOK9-ewBNwANagMYOJctBOK8KESRJCYv6xW9RxaHpe1-GFrDvbLq713ySKJENqvZMZfTiAuIdl6kKpv8RCDke-w%3D%3D)**
* Aligning centralized hospital efforts
* Establishing a hotline for businesses with questions – call 877-820-0890 or email **[covidresponse@iedc.in.gov](mailto:covidresponse@iedc.in.gov)**
* Urging Hoosiers impacted by a layoff to visit **[unemployment.IN.gov](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=e075677d1fc84a92ad629de380f078ec&_e=wsK0_y2nr4ms0cHUj8K74WN0tSyd96_oAsS4jWidU5PhqH1w-OdQyF6l2v-Ci1P__yC8G2SqvoRmQJX_UpKqQXTXMAo7JO1B5VelJtsQHsGQk_4hLaGQpEPQtvWQrc3VLBh2w-z7e9v4ZYsGMD2FxRMmQQGlsH4qY-iUBhJeZp7fXQJQsfAlyLr2CC0Npli9G88qFMdKBlj3lPVcECEe4qWBokcKhEwFBtJr5DOs07ZUH3JOZjpYDVFmBlOP-Jxnxn3sFViBAocsBuamPT4gXw%3D%3D)** to connect with benefits

clean_body: We’re in this fight together. And together, we’ll win this war against COVID-19. | | | ---|---|--- Friend, Yesterday, we told you about Governor Holcomb’s latest actions to limit the spread of the coronavirus and save Hoosier lives. He had a simple message in these complicated times – “Hunker down, Hoosiers.” And today he told us stories about the Hoosier character and spirit: It’s the Hoosier who anonymously donated 150 face masks to the Indiana State Department of Health. They said, “‘I don't want anything. I don't want recognition. I don't want to be paid. I want to help.” It’s the uniformed police officers in Southport making runs for the elderly, making sure they get food and medicine. It’s a refurbished school bus in Plainfield delivering meals. It’s the casino in Hammond that quickly donated all of its perishable food to community programs. It’s a community partnership in New Albany that’s helping restaurant workers who are temporarily out of work. And it’s every ordinary Hoosier who is stepping up, staying home, and saving lives. These stories are the whole purpose of “Hunker down, Hoosiers.” It’s about fighting back. We’re in this fight together. And together, we’ll win this war against COVID-19. “We're acting now. Fighting back. That’s the whole purpose of hunker down Hoosiers. It's to make sure we get through this storm as fast as humanly possible.” – Gov. Holcomb Thanks, -Your Holcomb Crew P.S. In case you missed today’s press conference, here are a few of Governor Holcomb’s latest actions he shared -- Helping homeless populations: Aligning centralized hospital efforts Establishing a hotline for businesses with questions – call 877-820-0890 or email mailto:covidresponse@iedc.in.gov Urging Hoosiers impacted by a layoff to visit to connect with benefits | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. name: Team Hagerty
subject: #TeamHagerty Shares COVID-19 Resources, Bill Submits Nominating Petition
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-jj/)
# March 24, 2020
## **Coronavirus In Tennessee**
#TeamHagerty is continuing to do everything we can to help our fellow Tennesseans - especially those who are vulnerable and at high risk for coronavirus. We've compiled a list of resources for those looking for ways to support their community. To check out our list and to find other resources on CDC best practices click **[HERE](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-r/)** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-y/) See more content like this **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-j/)** **Don't Miss: Bill's Tele-town Hall with Larry Kudlow** As our nation's leaders continue to prevent the spread of the Wuhan coronavirus, Bill announced today he will be hosting a telephone town hall with President Trump's National Economic Council Director Larry Kudlow to talk about the Wuhan coronavirus and our nation's economy. The telephone town hall will be held on **Wednesday, March 25th at 11:30 am EST/10:30 am CST.** Stay on the lookout for the town hall on Bill's Twitter **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-t/)** **Hagerty Files Record-Breaking Nominating Petition For U.S. Senate Campaign** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-i/) Yesterday, Bill filed his nominating petition to qualify for the Republican primary ballot in the U.S. Senate race with the most signatures for a GOP candidate running for public office in Tennessee history. We are so thankful for the overwhelming support of #TeamHagerty all across the state. **ICYMI: Read Bill's Op-Ed in The Tennessean** Last week, Bill released an editorital in the Tennesseean thanking the health professionals and first responders in Tennessee for working on the front lines of combatting the coronavirus in our state. Our first responders, health care workers, and military members, like those in the U.S. Public Health Service Commissioned Corps, deserve a great deal of credit for keeping our communities safe. It's times like these that we are reminded why Tennessee is called the Volunteer State. To read Bill's Op-Ed **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-d/)**
## **Be a Part of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-h/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-k/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-u/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Tennessean:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-m/)** Heed advice of health professionals and first responders on front lines of coronavirus fight**[Breitbart:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-c/) **Bill Hagerty: China Should Be Held Accountable For The Wuhan Coronavirus**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-q/) **Bill Hagerty Says We Must Hold China Accountable for Coronavirus**[Breitbart:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-a/)** Tennessee Senate Candidate Amb. Bill Hagerty: "The Chinese Have Got To Be Held Accountable"**[Chattanoogan:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-f/) **Hagerty: End Human Trafficking, Support Death Penalty For Traffickers - And Response
## **What They're Saying...**
> _" After looking Bill in the eye, I can fully vouch for the fact that he is a pro-life, Second Amendment custodian in full support of our president's agenda. Without hesitation, I intend to support and vote for him and humbly ask that you do as well."_
> _[-](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-z/)_[ Jeff Broyles](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-v/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty will work with President Trump, just as he did while Ambassador to Japan, to protect our farmers and make sure that they are treated fairly when it comes to trade. He has my support to be Tennessee's next Senator."_
> [-Mayor Rick Graham](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-e/) _" Bill Hagerty is running for the United States Senate to combat the radical socialists and their agenda. I know Bill will stand with President Donald Trump to protect my conservative values and the conservative values of so many Tennesseans across the state."_
> [-Michael Tedder](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" That's why it's very important that we send a senator to Washington, D.C., who understands how dangerous this is and who will stop the Democrats' extremely liberal agenda. I believe that representative is Bill Hagerty, a fiscal conservative running for the United States Senate who is endorsed by President Trump."_
> [-Kenneth Eaton](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-w/) _" I am supporting Bill Hagerty for Senate because he will continue fighting for family-owned farms, like mine, to ensure we have the resources necessary to compete on a global scale and win."_
> [-Charlotte Kelley](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-yh/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-yk/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-yu/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-jl/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-jr/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkljjty-fuutjhhtj-jy/)

name: Corky Messner
subject: Unbelievable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
ENOUGH IS ENOUGH! This is not the time for partisan games. Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c95ccaddceda62a1/7b5b200e811b1e87c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, **I’m sure you saw the news – Senate Democrats, in a stunning move, voted TWICE in recent days to block emergency COVID-19 relief for American families and businesses**.

And to watch the D.C. elites LAUGH as they cast their latest ‘nay’ vote?

My blood was boiling.

We have Americans dying, millions of people losing their jobs, businesses closing, and our economy on the brink of collapse... and these “leaders” want to play political games.

They are HOLDING AMERICA HOSTAGE to push their far-left agenda!

We need to make sure that EVERY Granite Stater remembers this on Election Day. I don’t think I’ve ever seen such brazen, desperate, and unforgivable partisanship.

[**Please donate $5, $10, $25, $50, or $100, to help hold the career politicians accountable for obstructing economic relief for the American people**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c95ccaddceda62a1/719841a25d4b8411c3d6b838967d376c/33153).

What is it, exactly, that they voted against?

_They voted AGAINST sending immediate direct payments to the American people._

_They voted AGAINST forgivable SBA loans for small businesses to protect jobs._

_They voted AGAINST loans for larger businesses, with numerous stipulations attached to protect taxpayers._

_They voted AGAINST emergency funds for hospitals, the CDC, FEMA, our military, and our schools... and the list goes on!_

The American people are sacrificing greatly to slow the spread of the coronavirus. It’s outrageous that arrogant career politicians, who should be setting aside politics to put our families and businesses first, refuse to drop their personal grudges and left-wing partisan nonsense even in a time like this.

[**Help us keep up our fight to DEFEAT Jeanne Shaheen this seat in November**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c95ccaddceda62a1/0493bd2a51b2dac7c3d6b838967d376c/33153).

Sincerely,

Corky Messner
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate [**Donate $5 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c95ccaddceda62a1/1e4c6150e4bfef0ac3d6b838967d376c/33153) **[Donate $10>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c95ccaddceda62a1/2d3a0f54faa028d1c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** **[Donate $25>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c95ccaddceda62a1/4842d357e56a4b92c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** **[Donate $50>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c95ccaddceda62a1/4d3eba0ceb13d675c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** **[Donate $100>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c95ccaddceda62a1/25768086ac6692c9c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** **[Donate Another Amount>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c95ccaddceda62a1/74b4fbd3ce743b15c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c95ccaddceda62a1/87a85f0f032e4679c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c95ccaddceda62a1/35da24af34ec41c3c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

clean_body: ENOUGH IS ENOUGH! This is not the time for partisan games. Read more >> Peter, I’m sure you saw the news – Senate Democrats, in a stunning move, voted TWICE in recent days to block emergency COVID-19 relief for American families and businesses. And to watch the D.C. elites LAUGH as they cast their latest ‘nay’ vote? My blood was boiling. We have Americans dying, millions of people losing their jobs, businesses closing, and our economy on the brink of collapse... and these “leaders” want to play political games. They are HOLDING AMERICA HOSTAGE to push their far-left agenda! We need to make sure that EVERY Granite Stater remembers this on Election Day. I don’t think I’ve ever seen such brazen, desperate, and unforgivable partisanship. . What is it, exactly, that they voted against? They voted AGAINST sending immediate direct payments to the American people. They voted AGAINST forgivable SBA loans for small businesses to protect jobs. They voted AGAINST loans for larger businesses, with numerous stipulations attached to protect taxpayers. They voted AGAINST emergency funds for hospitals, the CDC, FEMA, our military, and our schools... and the list goes on! The American people are sacrificing greatly to slow the spread of the coronavirus. It’s outrageous that arrogant career politicians, who should be setting aside politics to put our families and businesses first, refuse to drop their personal grudges and left-wing partisan nonsense even in a time like this. . Sincerely, Corky Messner Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | | | ---|--- id:2020-03-19-16:27:38:055t PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE

| Congressional Candidate Claire Chase Delivers Meals on Wheels
Claire Chase said, "Yesterday I volunteered with Meals on Wheels to deliver lunches in Artesia. Unfortunately, Meals on Wheels has lost many elderly volunteers due to fear of the coronavirus. They are doing amazing work to provide meals to some of our most vulnerable, but they can't do it alone. name: Dean Browning
subject: Application for Mail-In Ballot
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
I hope you and your family are staying safe and healthy while our nation continues to deal with the coronavirus, also known as COVID-19. Considering everything that is happening, it is easy to lose sight of the upcoming elections. Currently, Pennsylvania has a Primary Election scheduled to take place in just five (5) weeks on Tuesday, April 28th. However, to add to the uncertainty of the times, there is a strong likelihood that the Primary Election will be postponed to a later date. It is reported that Tuesday, June 2nd could be the alternative election day, but no official date is set yet. However, regardless of when the Primary Election is held, Pennsylvania voters now have the option of casting their ballot by mail. If you have any concern about you or anyone in your family going to your polling place, then I would strongly encourage you to vote by mail. The process is easy and straightforward. Just click the button below to print out an application.
[Click here to print the application! ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oLy1_oM9a0HDW3IzD88Jloi4Stsm6wzb9tMivGDtwCayxUDXRSjF2F4i8T4Oe3EmDtzvNTSVd39WoZdIPZn_VSImgiQTOSjeNtBbt3S8rWn5dXDg45YOegHXK8IuwQWCUblCETIFRuii0l159BCBc23sNZacT6DE3deGfTN2I5fctTBU9xD9ZzauOy12HDE4AY3-kC-HHmoRaEtkxa5zpoKwLP_Hg9fN&c=M3PVzo4f_Yj0GoVyoqpTeo2sZelI2tqR2MjAnuDYGmgPhSD4R7GVzQ==&ch=XAchMAaPYhoI5SRNrqVohFZoRVpSDSPWv_xBJ69KqWaarSRTHFl_nw==)
Once the application is completed, you will need to mail or deliver it to the Voter Registration office for your respective county.
Here is the list of addresses for each county in the PA-7th Congressional District as follows:
Lehigh County Voter Registration 17 S. 7th Street Allentown, PA 18101-2401 Monroe County Voter Registration One Quaker Plaza, Rm 105 Stroudsburg, PA 18360 Northampton County Voter Registration 670 Wolf Avenue Easton, PA 18042 If you have any questions about this process, please immediately call me at 484-550-6550 or go to [www.votepa.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oLy1_oM9a0HDW3IzD88Jloi4Stsm6wzb9tMivGDtwCayxUDXRSjF2F4i8T4Oe3EmrMEk8Kd7bl0DXE_ktYD0Myio3OKQgfq7_hbw1N5HWCalsgfkIBkpS8AwSELJ1DPzlYjrJosCTrI=&c=M3PVzo4f_Yj0GoVyoqpTeo2sZelI2tqR2MjAnuDYGmgPhSD4R7GVzQ==&ch=XAchMAaPYhoI5SRNrqVohFZoRVpSDSPWv_xBJ69KqWaarSRTHFl_nw==). Please remember to exercise your right to vote so your voice can be heard in the upcoming Primary Election. I would greatly appreciate your support, and with your help, we can return conservative grassroots representation in our nation's capital! I pray that Almighty God guides us through the current crisis and that He keeps you and your family safe and healthy.
For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oLy1_oM9a0HDW3IzD88Jloi4Stsm6wzb9tMivGDtwCayxUDXRSjF2F4i8T4Oe3EmfMgETu-nuewVouf1OcCeIpXplZZh7IzIW3ExXxD3_0qkxCfHtGWEOapWSG9NnKt9GFfuPyKC9XNJH_DRF-F-AY7fXqVYKe-nbCqBYv18twbX4iUKiZqH9Q==&c=M3PVzo4f_Yj0GoVyoqpTeo2sZelI2tqR2MjAnuDYGmgPhSD4R7GVzQ==&ch=XAchMAaPYhoI5SRNrqVohFZoRVpSDSPWv_xBJ69KqWaarSRTHFl_nw==)

I would greatly appreciate your support, and with your help, we can return conservative grassroots representation in our nation's capital! I pray that Almighty God guides us through the current crisis and that He keeps you and your family safe and healthy. For Freedom, | | Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07 | | | == | == == | | | Dean Browning | 2432 W. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Politicians Profit from COVID-19??
body:
End Capitol Corruption | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/politicians-profit-from-covid-19?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
| _**IT'S TIME TO END THESE HEADLINES...**_

**KANSAS IS THE KEY.
TOGETHER WE CAN REFORM WASHINGTON.**
Dear Friend,

You may recall that early in this campaign I proposed stringent ethics reforms for those in Congress. I focused on accountability, term limits, ending congressional pensions, and prohibiting certain campaign contributions to committee members by those industries over which they have oversight.

The root of Washington corruption is those who hang around Washington long enough seem to find all the loopholes allowing them to profit from their positions. **We can do better. And, it starts with putting an end to career politicians.**

**Elected senators profiting from the health and economic devastation sweeping through our country is unconscionable.** It was not long ago that Congress passed the STOCK ACT to prevent insider trading by elected officials and to eliminate profiting from conflicts of interest. But, the STOCK ACT is easily evaded by crafty career politicians.

The Washington Examiner sums up the problem well: _“Senators are further protected by the fact that conflict-of-interest rules for senators are nebulous. While executive branch officials (notably, excepting the president) have strict rules about what stocks they can and cannot hold and what transactions they can and cannot make,_**senators are mostly allowed to self-police**.”__

The article further notes that investigating these trades is problematic as the ‘insider’ information may have been disclosed in classified meetings and investigators lack the appropriate security clearance to review the information. If there is evidence to be found, it will never see the light of day.

We have career politicians all too frequently profiting from their position – whether questionable stock trades, securing business for relatives, back channeling information to supporters, or abusing the funds of their offices or campaign accounts. __ The fact is that Washington will not change until we change the people we send there. __
** I will prioritize term limits and
eliminating congressional perks and loopholes. **
Please join with me in this effort. **My campaign is built on support from Kansans like you.** _And, that’s the way it should be_ – I want to be the senator for Kansas, not Washington, not a coalition of special interest groups. Please join my team, donate, and learn more about my campaign by clicking on the buttons below.

---
| [DONATE NOW](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=abb882fd1a&e=41f8e27552 "DONATE NOW")
---
| [JOIN THE TEAM](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=98f7247ec9&e=41f8e27552 "JOIN THE TEAM")
---
| [VIEW DAVE'S PRIORITIES](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=86a1a587c9&e=41f8e27552 "VIEW DAVE'S PRIORITIES")
---
| |
---

_**Thank you again for standing with me as we take a stand together for our families and our nation!**_ **Dave**

body:
MJ's entire life has been about fighting for what's right, from flying rescue missions in Afghanistan to taking on both parties and the Pentagon to open ground combat roles to women.

Peter,

Right now people all over Texas (and all over the world) are facing tough times. This crisis is a stark reminder that **we need leaders in government who are committed to elevating experts and doing what 's needed to protect our communities** \-- even when those actions are unpopular.

That's why it's so important that we elect MJ Hegar to the Senate this November. MJ's entire life has been about fighting for what's right, from flying rescue missions in Afghanistan to taking on both parties _and_ the Pentagon to open ground combat roles to women. Now she's running this campaign with grassroots support and NO corporate PACs.

**MJ 's proven she has the guts to take on tough fights _and_ the grit to win them, but she's counting on your help too. [Pitch in to help MJ keep building the grassroots movement she needs to BEAT Sen. Cornyn!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903f6/7f51f7bc/4c3cd841/4ef1d1ab/974655089/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMTQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200325.1nd__1114__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

While MJ has been serving our country and campaigning to create a Senate that works for _all_ Texans, Sen. Cornyn has been serving Washington bosses and putting special interests ahead of his constituents.

That's the exact opposite of the leadership we need right now -- but the special interests Sen. Cornyn works for are going into overdrive to help him win reelection, and we need your help to fight back!

**Pitch in to help us elect MJ, a Texas-tough leader who will _always_ put Texans first, to the Senate this November:**

We are working on several measures to address the changing needs of Minnesotans during this crisis and **tomorrow we are going into session to pass relief legislation to address Minnesotans ' health and economic concerns. ** Minnesotans' input is still a vital part of the legislative process. name: Team Booker

body:
This is not the news we wanted to hear: Mitch McConnell is investing a record amount of money to protect his seat and his Senate majority.
#
**This is not the news we wanted to hear:** Mitch McConnell is investing a record amount of money to protect his seat and his Senate majority.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16496488/175292149/-608480648?refcode=em20200325&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODk4ODExNS1jMDZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mbja2NxdTyAJJzyBrVg37BX-nIQbWkOUFOPOaogcZ1o=)
**To make matters worse:** we’ve been falling behind on our fundraising. We can’t afford to fall short on our FEC end-of-quarter goal if we want to compete with Mitch’s ads campaign.
**But here’s our silver lining:[We still have time to catch up if everyone starts pitching in today. Can you chip in $5 or anything you can afford today to help us hit our $20,000 goal and fund our movement to flip the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16496502/175292163/-608480648?refcode=em20200325&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODk4ODExNS1jMDZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mbja2NxdTyAJJzyBrVg37BX-nIQbWkOUFOPOaogcZ1o=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16496503/175292164/-608480648?refcode=em20200325&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODk4ODExNS1jMDZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mbja2NxdTyAJJzyBrVg37BX-nIQbWkOUFOPOaogcZ1o=)****
**We knew that Mitch was going to pull out all the stops to protect his seat and his Republican colleagues, but we didn’t expect this. **
**This is _DOUBLE_ the amount of money his super PAC invested for the 2018 midterms. **
****But this proves just how scared Mitch is of the progressive movement rising across the country.** He knows that our grassroots army is ready to fight this election and that his seat has never been more vulnerable. **
**People are hungry for candidates like Charles Booker: he proudly stands up for our progressive values and advocates for bold solutions like Medicare for All & a Green New Deal. **
**[**Will you chip in $5 and send a message to Mitch’s super PAC that our grassroots movement isn’t backing down? We’re going to fight harder than ever these next six days to hit our $20,000 goal and raise the funds Charles needs to beat Mitch.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16496504/175292165/-608480648?refcode=em20200325&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODk4ODExNS1jMDZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mbja2NxdTyAJJzyBrVg37BX-nIQbWkOUFOPOaogcZ1o=)**
Let’s do this,

name: Blue Georgia
subject: re: health care (Obama's legacy at risk)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
This is bad, friend.

_The New York Times_ just reported that a Trump-backed court case to dismantle the Affordable Care Act is headed to the Supreme Court. **If Republicans win, the entire ACA, including protections for those with preexisting conditions, could be thrown out the window. **
At a time when affordable, quality health care coverage is so important, we need Americans to raise their voices _together_ to oppose the GOP's health care sabotage and defend President Obama's legacy - **but we still need** **37 more people from Georgia to sign our petition by midnight, and we don't see your name.**
**[Please, click here now to demand Congress protect access to affordable health care! We need people like you to take a stand against the GOP's attacks on our health care ASAP- before it's too late.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/marchacaprotections?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=Warnock&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-priorities-refresh%3Fcode%3Djtk83-ja-nd")**
| | [Sign the Petition](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/marchacaprotections?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=Warnock&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-priorities-refresh%3Fcode%3Djtk83-ja-nd")
---
Ten years ago, President Obama signed the Affordable Care Act into law, expanding health care coverage to millions of Americans and cutting the uninsured rate in half. It was a historic moment for our country.
But since then, the ACA has been under constant attack, and Republicans like Mitch McConnell have used every trick in the book to try and destroy it.
That's why it's never been more important to elect leaders like Reverend Warnock (D) to the Senate. He believes that our lawmakers should be fighting to _protect _quality, affordable health care - not take it away.
**[If you're fed up with Republican attacks on the Affordable Care Act and ready to fight back, please add your name right now to this important petition. It's never been more important to speak out on this issue.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/marchacaprotections?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=Warnock&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-priorities-refresh%3Fcode%3Djtk83-ja-nd")**
| | [Sign the Petition](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/marchacaprotections?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=Warnock&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-priorities-refresh%3Fcode%3Djtk83-ja-nd")
---
We're grateful to have you with us in this fight.

Thanks,
Team Warnock

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Our Country Must Come Together
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friends- In the days and weeks ahead we will undoubtedly face many challenges, but as a nation we must work together to overcome these hardships. Here in New York we worked together to expand testing and hospital bed capacity, get supplies to essential employees, postpone mortgage payments and income tax collection.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=126A173A1A2159)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends-

In the days and weeks ahead we will undoubtedly face many challenges, but as a nation we must work together to overcome these hardships.

Here in New York we worked together to expand testing and hospital bed capacity, get supplies to essential employees, postpone mortgage payments and income tax collection.

[Speaking with Joe Piscopo](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=126A173A1A2160), I discussed our push to get Mayor de Blasio to freeze collection of property taxes and water bills and the need to better protect city workers from COVID-19.

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=126A173A1A2160)
---
| | |
---
| | [ LISTEN NOW ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=126A173A1A2160)
---
| | |
---
| | But even during an emergency situation, we shockingly see those attempting to use our current crisis to push their radical agenda. New York City Mayor Bill de Blasio and Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley pushed for the release of prisoners. Nancy Pelosi has held up the bi-partisan Emergency Bill that would aid small businesses and provide relief for American families with her attempts to include controversial policy not related to Coronavirus relief efforts.

[Earlier this week, I told Breitbart](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=126A173A1A2161) that this is a time for our country to come together. We’re seeing President Trump and Governor Cuomo work together and, locally, Republicans and Democrats are unified in helping our community overcome this crisis.

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=126A173A1A2161)
---
| | |
---
| | [ LISTEN NOW ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=126A173A1A2161)
---
| | |
---
| | We continuously seek supplies for our hospitals, nursing homes and first responders. Anyone with masks, surgical gloves, ventilators please email me at [nicole@nicoleforny.com](mailto:nicole@nicoleforny.com).

Stay safe and healthy,

---
| |
---
| | Nicole Malliotakis

---
| | |
---

---
| | | [ VISIT PAGE ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=126A173A1A2162)

name: Kathleen Sebelius
subject: Michelle needs your help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
These are not ordinary times and this isn’t an ordinary request. As we face a very serious health and economic crisis in the US, the need for competent, caring and hard-working individuals to serve in our government is more important than ever.

Dear friends,

These are not ordinary times and this isn’t an ordinary request. As we face a very serious health and economic crisis in the US, the need for competent, caring and hard-working individuals to serve in our government is more important than ever. I am very proud of the work that our Governor, Laura Kelly, is doing to keep Kansans safe, secure, and informed. And I appreciate Sharice Davids more than ever, as she works with her colleagues in the House to act quickly on behalf of American families.

But we need a different representative in the 2nd District! And we have a great candidate in Mayor Michelle De La Isla who is running for Congress. As complicated as our lives have become trying to follow health guidance and keep our families and ourselves safe, think of how complicated it is to try and run for office in this unprecedented time. Gatherings have been cancelled, and instead of meeting lots of constituents, candidates are told to stay home. The November election will still happen, but time is being lost to conduct an effective campaign.

Michelle declared for Congress in January and knew that her first quarter of fundraising, which ends on March 31st, is her most important. She needs to raise $300,000 this quarter to run her campaign's planned strategy to reach voters, and to show Democrats across the county that she can win this battleground district. She has been working hard, calling donors and connecting with voters across the district. She's already raised over $250,000 so far -- but Michelle was counting on a number of events and donors in the next few weeks to help with this final push.

So, I am calling on you to help her reach this goal. If you haven’t given, please give now! If you have made a donation and thought you might do more later in the campaign, now is the time! We desperately need new leaders for Kansas -- and for the country. In times of crisis, we need to focus on supporting each other in the short term, and fixing problems for the future.

**[If you can, please donate $5 or more before Michelle's end-of-quarter deadline on Tuesday at midnight. Every dollar gets her one step closer to this important goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16498833/175315482/-1341710104?gpsid=8_122_12204&refcode=em20_200325_sebeli_fnd_gq_ful__KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200325_sebeli_fnd_gq_ful__KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGFiMzVkNS1jYTZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qLFahs_G-agbZHkDR18v0PIfN1EooRlKGh1Glu12P9U=)**

Stay well and take care of yourself, your family and your neighbors.
With gratitude,

Kathleen Sebelius
****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16498835/175315485/-1341710104?gpsid=8_122_12204&refcode=em20_200325_sebeli_fnd_gq_ful__KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200325_sebeli_fnd_gq_ful__KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGFiMzVkNS1jYTZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qLFahs_G-agbZHkDR18v0PIfN1EooRlKGh1Glu12P9U=)****
---

Topeka, KS 66667

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: 5X-Matching Unlocked: Stop Pelosi Fund
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Frankly, the Democrats' obstructionist actions are unacceptable which is why I have activated 5X MATCHING until midnight tonight to our Stop Pelosi Fund.

Friend, we need to talk.

At a time when our leaders should be coming together for the sake of ALL Americans, Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer have chosen to prioritize outrageous partisan games.

Instead of helping families, Democrats want to regulate airplane emissions.

Instead of helping small business owners, Democrats want to pass ballot harvesting legislation.

Instead of working together as one team for America, Democrats chose to dismantle any attempt to provide relief.

Speaker Pelosi and her Liberal minions have failed us. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: White House Reaches Deal on Coronavirus Stimulus Bill
body:
The relief package "will provide direct financial checks to many Americans, drastically expand unemployment insurance, offer..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=62862d7c45&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **White House Reaches Deal on Coronavirus Stimulus Bill**

“Lawmakers and the Trump administration reached an agreement on an estimated $2 trillion stimulus package aimed at shielding the U.S. economy from the worst consequences of the coronavirus pandemic,” Joshua Jamerson and Andrew Duehren report for _The Wall Street Journal_.

The relief package “will provide direct financial checks to many Americans, drastically expand unemployment insurance, offer hundreds [of] billions in loans to both small and large businesses, and provide health care providers with additional resources as the virus spreads.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c498f98457&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The United States was ranked the best-prepared country in the world to handle a pandemic in late 2019 by the Nuclear Threat Initiative (NTI) and the Johns Hopkins Center for Health Security (JHCHS)—an assessment seemingly at odds with claims by Democrats that the Trump administration left the country vulnerable to the ongoing coronavirus outbreak,” Gregg Re reports for [**Fox News**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=62488f8690&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| President Trump is thankful for every citizen doing his or her part during this global pandemic. It’s clear that Americans are coming together: “On day nine of a 15 day social distancing period, President Trump is getting a positive report card from Americans,” with a majority approving his handling of the crisis, Katie Pavlich writes in [_Townhall_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=acefa00d67&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump can’t do right by some critics no matter what he does. For three years he’s been denounced as a reckless authoritarian, and now he’s attacked for not being authoritarian enough by refusing to commandeer American industry. The truth is that private industry is responding to the coronavirus” with support from the government rather than “command and control,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=75bc171cbe&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e428a31ab9&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fd4f993f7e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c941f8e593)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: wvparty@wvdemocrats.com
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
Fellow Democrat,
It's been a few days since we've checked in with all of you. We want you to know that we are doing everything we can to navigate through these uncertain and unprecedented times. The safety and health of all of you is our top priority. We have taken measures to keep our staff safe, to keep all of you safe, and to ensure that our progress keeps moving forward even though it may look a little different now.
We are working together via phone and electronically to do the best we can to ensure that 2020 is a successful year for Democrats. In order to be successful, we have to be safe. Working with the DNC, we have rescheduled our County Conventions under the advisement of national and local leaders and health officials. We are trying to make it as simple as possible for Democrats to vote in the Primary Election since now ALL WEST VIRGINIANS are able to request an Absentee Ballot. We will continue working to provide information and help to all of our committees, partners, and voters.
Any information that we provide to you, please share with your fellow Democrats and friends.

**1.** Working with the DNC, we have made the decision to postpone and reschedule our County Conventions. County Conventions were orginially scheduled for this Saturday, March 28th but now will be held on Saturday, May 16th. We will get more information out to you (such as adjusted deadlines) as it becomes available.
**Below is our Press Release Announcement: **
**2.** Absentee Voting:
🗳 Every West Virginian can now request an Absentee Ballot because of COVID-19.
It's important that you request an Absentee Ballot! It's also important that you check the right box and follow the instructions.
1\. Go to [GoVoteWV.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16500823/175336258/1286482588?u=http%3A%2F%2FGoVoteWV.com%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR0sKQwFuCGz_ckdiUGdXyKgs-VQQhf8vUjl2D2YL8ffmyQbtWF8i7P9EN8&h=AT0iYfPPSOi-QW6Wq4AsLkY3l8Ebf3FlC4a9tJ4TfXESzfCpvDzD7zoSlUZqSs5jZzLSdh_AI1ZAEBZGreSRLXfZ2gKin8iHaysvAT07pcjsEIun7pBAE5vvDX5ap6mdD-Wwaoz3hC3A46RjU3pV1UjY4BP6nrtIL16tsQaH4mqGAX3wtz_CzyNF_0is86TqCiJ3oB5chkAne8hBz8ggv6SuNAb4TWAFsCHndrTmpVeJSC08p4cRVPiNRCbai7lLSVcKWlQxfiI77Bay5yRvLH7U0PPqPEX_KcmTR583w8hkiV9lZv-_bCyFhoObvbGWoOFM6bnXodtynS0kA_v5rH_JulpP1sSKu3Add7GMnfsu5bgYX48wniN5SdBZTX4YtaMPNbEm0hc2QMl__-TQ7c80sTq5kjzsMyCwgvDSxKe4fomWQbt-43PZ47XCO1OqubVFHykcKmqjGLdUVAsfaX7c6mzH5qE6W2mtWTYhmeFyyynfHiJERpDkk8pTHo9M2q_IKdbjVD8VzOVc_xCLsnCzPgTtbtF8L87VUiOqXI2Z0U-ACuMzm_89K9rhBYdJz1NLSfcawX5XUTNYEYDl7VjsCWHzoZarVTgDLR9sQnMyB6EOrqsUXxXRq23-Poqag3teY_Nsrg-APg&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzcxNTM3OS1kMjZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVVeOKKPkmFebyP53wvyYM87fBRT_3HSiqydEaFylpw=&emci=70083e5d-c46e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=4c715379-d26e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=5094937) ➡️ Absentee Voting ➡️ Absentee Ballot Application
2. 🖨Print it off and fill it out.
3\. Make sure you ✅ the box that says "Illness, injury or other medical reason which keeps me confined."
4\. Mail it to your County Clerk you can find here: [https://sos.wv.gov/elections/Pages/CountyClerkDirectory.aspx](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16500824/175336259/-1750701001?fbclid=IwAR0gmJnPEtNil-qn31TCYUilJaf9LV-h48ddqP_LK0Q8F0F1gMYlE5VdPbE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzcxNTM3OS1kMjZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVVeOKKPkmFebyP53wvyYM87fBRT_3HSiqydEaFylpw=&emci=70083e5d-c46e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=4c715379-d26e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=5094937)
Troubleshooting*** If you do not have access to a printer or have other trouble getting the ballot request form or mailing it in please contact your County Clerk from the list in the above link ⬆️⬆️⬆️!!

**3\. COVID-19 Resources **
**WV DHHR Website: [Click here for WV DHHR's latest updates to reported COVID-19 cases](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16500825/175336260/-363467401?cid=SenManchin&crop=18124.84510306.14758536.14611872&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fdhhr.wv.gov%2fCOVID-19%2fPages%2fdefault.aspx&redir_log=936514056906318&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzcxNTM3OS1kMjZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVVeOKKPkmFebyP53wvyYM87fBRT_3HSiqydEaFylpw=&emci=70083e5d-c46e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=4c715379-d26e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=5094937) ******

body:
While we may be apart physically, we are finding new ways to come together in support of one another.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16500917/175336716/1960319551?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzdhYWU5ZS1kMjZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=an2c1OOwj3dFXvuUI4aklVFmFkeau66KZdLu3NIilUM=&emci=f9066335-b66e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=bc7aae9e-d26e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249) Friend,

I hope you are staying safe and healthy. As our community is facing unprecedented challenges as a result of the COVID-19 outbreak, it’s so important that we are all doing what we can to lift each other up. That includes continuing to heed the advice of the [**CDC**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16500918/175336717/-1368851855?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzdhYWU5ZS1kMjZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=an2c1OOwj3dFXvuUI4aklVFmFkeau66KZdLu3NIilUM=&emci=f9066335-b66e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=bc7aae9e-d26e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249) and practice social distancing.

While we may be apart physically, we are finding new ways to come together in support of one another. Friend, in that spirit, my team and I have put together a list of some local charities working to combat this crisis here in South Central Pennsylvania. **If you are able, I hope you’ll consider joining me in support of one or more of these incredible organizations:**
* * *
[**United Way of the Capital Region**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16500919/175336718/-825144528?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzdhYWU5ZS1kMjZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=an2c1OOwj3dFXvuUI4aklVFmFkeau66KZdLu3NIilUM=&emci=f9066335-b66e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=bc7aae9e-d26e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249)
United Way of the Capital Region COVID-19 Community Response and Recovery fund will help support nonprofit partners associated with the United Way that are dealing with the tremendous increase in demand for basic needs services. **[Project S](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16500920/175336719/102689858?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzdhYWU5ZS1kMjZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=an2c1OOwj3dFXvuUI4aklVFmFkeau66KZdLu3NIilUM=&emci=f9066335-b66e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=bc7aae9e-d26e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249)**[**HARE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16500921/175336720/102689858?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzdhYWU5ZS1kMjZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=an2c1OOwj3dFXvuUI4aklVFmFkeau66KZdLu3NIilUM=&emci=f9066335-b66e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=bc7aae9e-d26e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249) Project SHARE is an interfaith cooperative effort in the Carlisle, PA area and is committed to their mission of providing access to healthy food to those struggling with food insecurity during COVID-19. **[York County Food Bank](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16500922/175336721/1877456114?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzdhYWU5ZS1kMjZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=an2c1OOwj3dFXvuUI4aklVFmFkeau66KZdLu3NIilUM=&emci=f9066335-b66e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=bc7aae9e-d26e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249)** York County Food Bank is committed to making sure all of our neighbors have access to enough food during the COVID-19 pandemic and are utilizing drive-thru food distributions. **[Alder Health Services](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16500923/175336722/-359303299?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzdhYWU5ZS1kMjZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=an2c1OOwj3dFXvuUI4aklVFmFkeau66KZdLu3NIilUM=&emci=f9066335-b66e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=bc7aae9e-d26e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249)** Alder Health Services is working diligently to continue to provide health care services to the LGBTQ+ community of South Central Pennsylvania during COVID-19.
* * *
We are dealing with a situation unlike anything we’ve ever seen. Supporting a charitable organization is one way we can help those in our community who are on the frontlines tackling this crisis.

Friend, I know these are uncertain times. But we’ll get through this together.

Thank you,

Eugene **** ****

body:
Fellow Democrat,
It's been a few days since we've checked in with all of you. We want you to know that we are doing everything we can to navigate through these uncertain and unprecedented times. The safety and health of all of you is our top priority. We have taken measures to keep our staff safe, to keep all of you safe, and to ensure that our progress keeps moving forward even though it may look a little different now.
We are working together via phone and electronically to do the best we can to ensure that 2020 is a successful year for Democrats. In order to be successful, we have to be safe. Working with the DNC, we have rescheduled our County Conventions under the advisement of national and local leaders and health officials. We are trying to make it as simple as possible for Democrats to vote in the Primary Election since now ALL WEST VIRGINIANS are able to request an Absentee Ballot. We will continue working to provide information and help to all of our committees, partners, and voters.
Any information that we provide to you, please share with your fellow Democrats and friends.

**1.** Working with the DNC, we have made the decision to postpone and reschedule our County Conventions. County Conventions were orginially scheduled for this Saturday, March 28th but now will be held on Saturday, May 16th. We will get more information out to you (such as adjusted deadlines) as it becomes available.
**Below is our Press Release Announcement: **
**2.** Absentee Voting:
🗳 Every West Virginian can now request an Absentee Ballot because of COVID-19.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: What we're doing in Washington state to address COVID-19
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Stopping the virus and protecting livelihoods -- here's what we've done in Washington.
| **From the Desk of Jay Inslee** Friend, As every state across the country faces the spread of COVID-19, I wanted to give you an update on what we're doing in Washington state: This is a challenge unlike anything we've faced before. Yet like so many challenges our state and our country have faced, the solution is in our own hands. And if we have each other's backs, we will persevere. We're coming together to support each other and to make our state safer and healthier. Our first priority has been to slow and contain the spread of COVID-19 in our communities -- that means millions of Washingtonians are staying home to save lives. Using local health departments, universities, and private labs, we've dramatically increased testing, and our insurance commissioner directed insurers to waive deductibles and copays. The state will also be covering the costs of tests for those without health insurance. Additionally, I recently announced unprecedented steps to give economic relief to Washingtonians -- because nobody should lose their home because they can't pay rent during this crisis. We're enacting a statewide moratorium on evictions, and public utilities will be suspending shut-offs and waiving late fees. Washington has in place nation-leading policies like paid family and medical leave and mandated paid sick days. We're using every part of our safety net to support families right now, including continuing to provide daily meals to out-of-school kids who need them. **Our response to COVID-19 must not just be about stopping the spread of the virus and caring for the sick -- it must also be about caring for our vulnerable neighbors and citizens whose livelihoods are impacted by this crisis.** This crisis is far from over. This challenge is unlike anything we've experienced before, but together, we'll meet this challenge with the seriousness and compassion it deserves. [**You can see more here of what we're doing in Washington to respond to COVID-19**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8531?t=3&akid=8042%2E868730%2EuMlSI0) \-- take care, and be safe. Very truly yours, Jay
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=8042%2E868730%2EuMlSI0). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111
---
All content (C) 2020 JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D), All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/3?t=2&akid=8042%2E868730%2EuMlSI0)

Hello, I'm reaching out to you today to explain something about the state of our campaign right now and what's at stake in this election.
The world is facing an unprecedented public health emergency. It's impacting every facet of American society.
For our campaign, it's meant canceling all in-person events, including our fundraisers. That means moving forward, we'll have to run a different kind of campaign. But we're still running for the same reasons, and with the same message.
**We need elected leaders who come together to get things done. Who put people first. That 's how we led the recovery from the Great Recession here in Colorado, and it's how we'll fight the COVID-19 pandemic. And I'll be honest, I'm not seeing a whole lot of that from Washington politicians right now.**
If you believe our country needs to come out of our partisan corners and get to work on the critical issues that impact all of us, I'm asking you to contribute to our campaign and help us flip this Senate seat blue.
Let me be clear, though, I only want you to pitch in if you are financially able to. I really mean that, friend.
**If you are financially able, please make a contribution to our campaign today. Anything you 're able to pitch in will help us flip this Senate seat and get our government working for the people again:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The world is facing an unprecedented public health emergency. It's impacting every facet of American society. For our campaign, it's meant canceling all in-person events, including our fundraisers. name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: Social isolation is difficult, especially for those living with mental health conditions.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390098/55b66746/23d97819/80e1d6c/3707329198/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Hi, Checking in and making sure you are doing well. We're now under a stay-at-home advisory in Massachusetts, so I've been spending my time at home with Lauren, Ellie, and James. While I make a lot of jokes about the chaos (we are literally bouncing off the walls here), I also recognize two things. First, that it's a privilege to be safely home with family right now, to be healthy for the time being, and to have the resources to take care of ourselves. That is not the case for too many among us. If being cooped up is your biggest complaint right now - that is a tremendous gift. And second, I recognize that I am also incredibly lucky not to be braving this alone. Far too many, maybe you or someone you love, are in self-isolation at this moment. That can have profound impacts on mental health and wellbeing. With that in mind, last night I interviewed a friend of mine, Trenni Kusnierek, on how this global epidemic is impacting those with mental or behavioral health conditions. Trenni is a well-known local sports reporter here in Boston and someone who has very bravely and very publicly shared her own struggles with anxiety and depression. Take a minute to watch our conversation. Trenni provided so many helpful and powerful insights: **[facebook.com/JoeKennedyIII/ videos/508385779849126](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390098/55b66746/23d97819/80e1d6d/3707329198/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.facebook.com/JoeKennedyIII/videos/508385779849126")** Our conversation did get me thinking... especially about all those who are alone in their homes right now, and already may have gone a week without seeing another person, only talking to friends and loved ones on the phone - or perhaps not at all. So if you or a loved one is struggling right now, feeling isolated, feeling trapped, having fears about what is going on around us right now - here are some resources from the Anxiety and Depression Association of America. Take a minute to click through them if you need support. There is some really great advice and a wealth of resources. **[Anxiety and Depression Association of America (ADAA)](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390098/55b66746/23d97819/80e1d6e/3707329198/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://adaa.org/finding-help/coronavirus-anxiety-helpful-resources")** **[Quick Expert Tips to Manage Coronavirus Anxiety](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390098/55b66746/23d97819/80e1d6f/3707329198/VEsC/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xP14-Pc56xU")** **[COVID-19 Lockdown Guide: How to Manage Anxiety and Isolation During Quarantine](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390098/55b66746/23d97819/80e1d68/3707329198/VEsD/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://adaa.org/learn-from-us/from-the-experts/blog-posts/consumer/covid-19-lockdown-guide-how-manage-anxiety-and")** **[How to Talk to Your Anxious Child or Teen About Coronavirus](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390098/55b66746/23d97819/80e1d69/3707329198/VEsA/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://adaa.org/learn-from-us/from-the-experts/blog-posts/consumer/how-talk-your-anxious-child-or-teen-about")** Take care of yourself. Reach out for help if you need it. Find ways to keep loved ones "close" - FaceTime, Zoom, or a good, old-fashioned phone call. I know these are scary and uncertain times. But I also know we'll get through this, together. P.S. While it's not quite as good as talking to family or friends on the phone, we are regularly streaming live on Facebook and Twitter for our community. Come say hello there, share what you're feeling or experiencing - I'd love to hear from you. |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
---|---
| This email was sent by **[Joe Kennedy](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390098/55b66746/23d97819/80e1d6a/3707329198/VEsB/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/")**.
PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? [**Switch to our less email option here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390098/55b66746/23d97819/80e1d6b/3707329198/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/s/less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com; [click here to change your email address](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390098/55b66746/23d97819/80e1d74/3707329198/VEsP/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/update-address/"). If you no longer want to hear from Joe Kennedy, [click here to get off all our lists instantly.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390098/55b66746/23d97819/80e1d75/3707329198/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390098/55b66746/23d97819/80e1d76/3707329198/VEsHBA/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/contact/"). |

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Workers' rights [PETITION]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Sen. Cornyn should get to work to actually help workers through this crisis and beyond

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903f1/7f51f7bc/4c31b947/4ef1d1fb/3880733480/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

I'm a working mom with two young kiddos and, like many Texans, I've had to leave work to take care of them when they're sick. But right now there are tons of working Texans out there who can't make that choice because staying home means they lose their job.

That's why **I support paid family leave and paid sick leave as a worker 's right** \-- to make sure that no one is forced to go to work while sick or leave a sick family member alone at home in order to pay the bills. **It 's more urgent now than ever.** I'm putting together a petition calling on Sen. Cornyn to support paid family leave and paid sick leave for _everyone_ , and I need you with me. | [**Sign my petition and tell Sen. Cornyn to get on board with the rest of Texas.**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903f1/7f51f7bc/4c31b947/4ef1d1fa/3880733480/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://mjfortexas.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/mj-workersrights")
---
As your Senator, I promise to fight for the rights of working Texans -- but right now, Sen. Cornyn needs to get off his backside and make sure everyone has the ability to take paid family and sick leave.

**Add your name if you think that Sen. Cornyn should get to work to actually help workers through this crisis and beyond:**
**[**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903f1/7f51f7bc/4c31b947/4ef1d1fa/3880733480/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://mjfortexas.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/mj-workersrights")**
Thank you for adding your support!

\-- MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903f1/7f51f7bc/4c31b947/4ef1d1f9/3880733480/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-workersrights?refcode=email_20200325.2__1112__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903f1/7f51f7bc/4c31b947/4ef1d1f8/3880733480/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1112&amount=10&recurring=true")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903f1/7f51f7bc/4c31b947/4ef1d1ff/3880733480/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---
