name: KentuckyForBooker.com
subject: A brighter, more prosperous future (online)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
ICYMI: our campaign operations have moved online -- and we need your help now more than ever.
#
The COVID-19 public health crisis has taken over our news cycle and daily lives. These are trying, uncertain, and scary times for all Kentuckians and Americans.
To keep our staff and our fellow Kentuckians safe, we moved all of our campaign operations online last week.
We've adjusted to this new reality and are increasing our virtual outreach — but a fully digital, remote strategy costs money. And we need your help.
It's critical we raise $20,000 by the end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline in six days if we want to fund our new digital strategy, **but currently, we're falling a bit short.**
**[We need your support, now more than ever, to show the strength of our people-powered movement. Will you chip in $5 to our campaign to get Charles elected in the primary, and to come one step closer to defeating Mitch McConnell?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16505136/175378325/937375993?refcode=em20200325-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTE4ODRhNi1lMjZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xaj_6YMSebWF91piz5Iki6zxDF7-lGxDilzLmthnTIQ=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16505137/175378327/937375993?refcode=em20200325-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTE4ODRhNi1lMjZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xaj_6YMSebWF91piz5Iki6zxDF7-lGxDilzLmthnTIQ=)****
Just this week, Mitch McConnell failed _twice_ to move a pandemic relief bill through a chamber _that he controls_ because he stuffed it full of corporate slush funds instead of help for people. We can't afford to keep lawmakers with such misaligned priorities in office.
With your help, we can elect a Senator who elevates our voices and fights for us instead of his corporate donors.
**Our campaign may be 100% online now, but our work continues with even greater resolve towards winning a brighter, more prosperous future for all Kentuckians.** We're applying new ways to reach voters from a safe distance, including ads, remote phone banks, virtual trainings, and more.
**[We need your support to fund these new programs and make sure we can move the fight to defeat Mitch online. clean_body: ICYMI: our campaign operations have moved online -- and we need your help now more than ever. The COVID-19 public health crisis has taken over our news cycle and daily lives. These are trying, uncertain, and scary times for all Kentuckians and Americans. To keep our staff and our fellow Kentuckians safe, we moved all of our campaign operations online last week. We've adjusted to this new reality and are increasing our virtual outreach — but a fully digital, remote strategy costs money. And we need your help. It's critical we raise $20,000 by the end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline in six days if we want to fund our new digital strategy, but currently, we're falling a bit short. = **= Just this week, Mitch McConnell failed twice to move a pandemic relief bill through a chamber that he controls because he stuffed it full of corporate slush funds instead of help for people. We can't afford to keep lawmakers with such misaligned priorities in office. With your help, we can elect a Senator who elevates our voices and fights for us instead of his corporate donors. Our campaign may be 100% online now, but our work continues with even greater resolve towards winning a brighter, more prosperous future for all Kentuckians. We're applying new ways to reach voters from a safe distance, including ads, remote phone banks, virtual trainings, and more. =** Team Booker | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Kathy Manning
subject: It's clearer than ever:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
We need strong leaders in Washington
|
---

| | Team -- the difficulty and uncertainty of our current moment underscores just how critical it is to have strong leadership in Congress. We need leaders who will jump into action at a moment's notice and respond with thoughtful and effective plans to address the issues facing our country - issues such as access to affordable health care, distance and e-learning opportunities, and resources for individuals and small businesses who are being harmed by this crisis. The challenge we're facing now also underscores the importance of the upcoming election. It's true -- we need to replace President Trump, but we also need to defend the Democratic House Majority so we can advance progress in a timely and efficient manner. I'm prepared to get to work on day one to be the strong leader the Triad needs during these tough times. [_**Chip in to our campaign today ->**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d37c/3d199a51/2f605043/7364f156/2737070530/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDMyNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200325?refcode=kme200325_nd_other&refcode2=17426") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $10](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d37c/3d199a51/2f605043/7364f156/2737070530/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDMyNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200325?refcode=kme200325_nd_other&refcode2=17426")

name: Tom Cotton
subject: China stole US capacity to make drugs — we must take it back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
I wanted you to see my Fox News editorial about my work to take our pharmaceutical production out of China. From the beginning of this crisis, I have been leading the charge to expose the Chinese Communist party and how its lies helped spread this pandemic.
Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42107545&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcyMjQyMjQyMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

I wanted you to [**see my Fox News editorial**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDIxMDc1NDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcyMjQyMjQyMwS2&mt=1&rt=0) about my work to take our pharmaceutical production out of China.

>From the beginning of this crisis, I have been leading the charge to expose the Chinese Communist party and how its lies helped spread this pandemic.

As we are close to voting on an emergency relief bill, we must remember China's role in causing this pandemic so we can make sure it never happens again.

"Earlier this month, a Chinese Communist Party propaganda outlet insinuated that Beijing could cut off supplies of life-saving medicine to the United States at any time, dooming our country to "sink into the hell of a novel coronavirus epidemic."

Unfortunately, this isn't an empty threat. The United States is dangerously dependent for pharmaceuticals on the very regime whose failures and coverups caused this deadly pandemic to spiral out of control.

It's time to change that. We have a plan to end America's dependence on Chinese drugs and take back our ability to make pharmaceuticals and medical devices right here in America."

[**Click Here to read my full editorial**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDIxMDc1NDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcyMjQyMjQyMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

That's right -- after inflicting the world with this pandemic, the Chinese are now threatening to make it worse. We cannot allow this to happen.

I will continue to work to hold China accountable and to protect our supply chain from China's threats.

In service,

Senator Tom Cotton

Paid for by Cotton for Senate
---

2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

_Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch._

[Privacy Policy](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDIxMDc1NDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcyMjQyMjQyMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[Unsubscribe](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42107545&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcyMjQyMjQyMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Tina Smith
subject: Meals on Wheels
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Friends, I reached out to you a few days ago asking you to donate to an organization working on the frontlines of this public health emergency. Your response was incredible! **Together, we raised _thousands_ of dollars for one of the nation’s largest hunger-relief organizations in the country. ** But as the coronavirus pandemic deepens, so many people are facing unprecedented hardships — especially our seniors. That’s why **Meals on Wheels** is working around the clock to ensure they don’t go hungry during this crisis. So, I’m emailing you with the hope that you’d be willing to support another great cause at such a critical moment. I need your help to make sure Meals on Wheels can collect as many resources as it will take to keep seniors safe and make sure they’re getting the nutrition they need amid COVID-19. **[Our nation’s most vulnerable need our help. If you have anything to spare, can I count on you to add a donation to Meals on Wheels today? Your donation would help ensure this organization has the resources to keep our seniors safe and nourished during this public health crisis.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16506685/175396700/17034053?refcode=em200325-meals&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTIzYTUwZS1lYTZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uR_6ZxsregyhWlcNCrLI_llJURFK6APQ7Atz4mdvx3U=)** | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16506686/175396701/17034053?refcode=em200325-meals&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTIzYTUwZS1lYTZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uR_6ZxsregyhWlcNCrLI_llJURFK6APQ7Atz4mdvx3U=)
---
We all have a role to play in slowing the spread of the coronavirus. As you know, I’m doing everything I can in the Senate to support workers and seniors during this crisis. I’m asking you to do the same.
But please, only give if you can afford to do so. I know these are difficult times for many of us, so if your family is facing financial hardship, it’s okay to sit this one out. I appreciate you opening this email in the first place and taking a minute to read my message. It means the world to me.
Thank you. Take care of yourself and your loved ones.
— Tina
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
---
Tina Smith for Minnesota
PO Box 14362
St. Paul, MN 55114
United States

name: Unite the Country
subject: Our new ad that Fox News doesn't want you to see
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [www
body:
#
Peter --
We released our new ad "Crisis Comes" yesterday -- and last night Fox News refused to run it on air.
The ad reminds voters that crisis comes to every presidency, and what matters most is how presidents handle the crisis. On that measure, Donald Trump has failed us - and it's time for him to go.
**Here 's the ad Fox News doesn't want you to see. Will you watch it and then share with your social networks?**
[](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df761b/287b9173/2b059dfe/7e767558/3305027079/VEsH/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://pic.twitter.com/G8HvZ3AST2")
**[WATCH ON TWITTER](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df761b/287b9173/2b059dfe/7e767559/3305027079/VEsE/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://pic.twitter.com/G8HvZ3AST2")**
**[WATCH ON FACEBOOK](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df761b/287b9173/2b059dfe/7e76755a/3305027079/VEsF/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.facebook.com/104684067632334/videos/260188428321955/")**
Donald Trump did not create the coronavirus, but he is the one who called "hoax." He eliminated the United States' pandemic response team. He let the virus spread unchecked across America.
President Trump has failed us. It's time for him to go.
Will you share our new ad with your [**friends on Facebook**](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df761b/287b9173/2b059dfe/7e76755a/3305027079/VEsC/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.facebook.com/104684067632334/videos/260188428321955/") and [**your followers on Twitter**](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df761b/287b9173/2b059dfe/7e767558/3305027079/VEsD/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://pic.twitter.com/G8HvZ3AST2")?
Onward,
Unite the Country

clean_body: Peter -- We released our new ad "Crisis Comes" yesterday -- and last night Fox News refused to run it on air. The ad reminds voters that crisis comes to every presidency, and what matters most is how presidents handle the crisis. On that measure, Donald Trump has failed us - and it's time for him to go. Here 's the ad Fox News doesn't want you to see. Will you watch it and then share with your social networks? "" "" "" Donald Trump did not create the coronavirus, but he is the one who called "hoax." He eliminated the United States' pandemic response team. He let the virus spread unchecked across America. President Trump has failed us. It's time for him to go. Will you share our new ad with your "" and ""? Onward, Unite the Country "" "" "" * Paid for by Unite the Country, "", and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

body:
---
| | [**TRUMP: I am going to take New Mexico from Democrats**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200325_em_fr_b1_lujan_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,70,130,180") [**_This is the most important ask I 've ever made of you. After swooping into my home state and holding a massive rally to flip us red, Trump just announced he's COMING BACK to finish the job. I need a historic response -- 3,149 gifts in the next 24 hours -- to make his rally backfire. Every single gift will be emergency-matched to ensure we keep this crucial state in Democrats' hands. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200325_em_fr_b1_lujan_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,70,130,180") I'm asking you to make a critical choice in this moment:

\-- We can either let Trump come into our house, turn this state red, and sabotage our chance to flip the Senate.

[**\-- Or we can rise up, send a historic Democratic response, and show Trump that he will NEVER take this state from us.**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200325_em_fr_b1_lujan_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,70,130,180")

Let me be clear: New Mexico is absolutely crucial to winning a Democratic Senate.

I will fight until my last breath to defend it from Trump's snatches.

I'm counting on Democrats nationwide to have our back right now. Will you rush $10? Ben Ray

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. body:
Here's why I announced the Democratic Unity Fund last spring: | |
---
I am personally asking for your support at this critical moment for our party, Derek. Let me explain why this request is so urgent: We’re seeing unprecedented Democratic voter turnout this year. And while our candidates are vying for the Democratic nomination, it’s up to us to lay the groundwork that will harness that momentum. It’s the best way to make sure Democrats win up and down the ticket this year. Holding our House majority, taking back the Senate, winning governorships, and flipping state legislatures depends entirely on the investments we make right now. That’s where the DNC’s Democratic Unity Fund comes in. The fund supports the formation of an impressive infrastructure -- assembling and paying organizers in key battleground states and building world-class data systems to mobilize voters -- that will lift our eventual nominee and candidates down the ticket to victory. **Will you donate $7 to the DNC’s Democratic Unity Fund for the first time today? Every cent will help elect our eventual nominee and thousands of down-ballot Democrats.** **** **[ DONATE: $7 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/CgE/ni0YAA/t.30d/FUUyUbG7TY2D2ff8SdoayQ/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKQ9swT3a1vF1Cn-2FJjaviFkcAHiZ3kyNeleuIPCQGRriVVj11RxtoQkP6MwpUqTbAJkF9M-2FbSgCmU86eJ-2Fiu4HBtm9UPaFok1WLi1Yozr-2FZTPkyoKc0hxvgySq9r41uS6hvYic-2BNFanblM-2FTgLg3s96duc2V6H5wBlNXCVqwCtihzJUfBmA-2BAWwHogDpRtH2uJDF2zBscdnYxLSez7VU8nCEniDkYa22dxE9ppfwuzpljGNsBItog4yFV37R43ETO-2F8wBtj-2BOM-2BXQ7Rsr4aMUOO9WvC-2FGioNCGgnh5xfDrH5orQbcoqpKeV81Z6t9rQv0Z20w12HB7lDjPIZ9AP-2Bf6ieue0Tqc7QL0sEn5OHoWMsA-3D-3D/CGTu)

clean_body: Here's why I announced the Democratic Unity Fund last spring: | | I am personally asking for your support at this critical moment for our party, Derek. Let me explain why this request is so urgent: We’re seeing unprecedented Democratic voter turnout this year. And while our candidates are vying for the Democratic nomination, it’s up to us to lay the groundwork that will harness that momentum. It’s the best way to make sure Democrats win up and down the ticket this year. Holding our House majority, taking back the Senate, winning governorships, and flipping state legislatures depends entirely on the investments we make right now. That’s where the DNC’s Democratic Unity Fund comes in. The fund supports the formation of an impressive infrastructure -- assembling and paying organizers in key battleground states and building world-class data systems to mobilize voters -- that will lift our eventual nominee and candidates down the ticket to victory. Will you donate $7 to the DNC’s Democratic Unity Fund for the first time today? Every cent will help elect our eventual nominee and thousands of down-ballot Democrats. ** I was proud to launch the DNC’s Democratic Unity Fund because it supplies Democratic candidates and campaigns with the critical resources they need to win from local office to the Oval Office this year. We’re not just fighting for the White House here, Derek, we’re fighting for every seat at every level in all 50 states. Our country needs Democratic majorities in Congress and state legislatures who are serious about governing and want to bring about real change and improvements in people's lives. We need governors and mayors who stand up for all Americans, not just the rich and powerful. And, of course, we need a Democrat back in the White House. The DNC is the only party organization tasked with electing Democrats from the bottom of the ticket to the top this year -- and I am asking you to make an early investment in this critical work. Thank you for standing with me. Barack Obama P.S. Elections matter. There's no question about that. I'm asking you:

subject: Breaking: San Diego City Council Passes Sweeping Moratorium on Evictions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16508446/175416117/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDdmNTRlYy1mMjZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RnOE4fcKeLjlcpNNfakgIhMfMHkMdKdFXaI5olyBwm0=&emci=793ba7e3-c76e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=0d7f54ec-f26e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864)
Quick update, team:

I just wrapped a City Council meeting where, in partnership with Mayor Faulconer, we unanimously passed a sweeping legislation package to mitigate the financial hardships facing San Diego citizens and small businesses due to the COVID-19 crisis.

The package includes the following five pieces:
* A temporary **moratorium on evictions of residents** who cannot pay rent
* A temporary **moratorium on evictions of small businesses** that cannot pay leases
* A **prohibition on evicting tenants** who reside in San Diego Housing Commission controlled apartments
* A pledge to work with banks and lenders to **halt foreclosures on properties** whose owners are unable to pay mortgages
* Establishes a **$6 million Small Business Relief Fund** to support local businesses

I will continue to keep you informed of any other developments. I also encourage you to follow us on **[Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16508447/175416118/1542372102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDdmNTRlYy1mMjZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RnOE4fcKeLjlcpNNfakgIhMfMHkMdKdFXaI5olyBwm0=&emci=793ba7e3-c76e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=0d7f54ec-f26e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864)** and **[Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16508448/175416119/436224272?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDdmNTRlYy1mMjZlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RnOE4fcKeLjlcpNNfakgIhMfMHkMdKdFXaI5olyBwm0=&emci=793ba7e3-c76e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=0d7f54ec-f26e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864)** where I post regular updates about how you can do your part to keep your city safe.

As always, thank you for your support, and please stay safe.

_Georgette_

**[Follow us on Twitter](https://twitter.com/sdgeorgette)****[Follow us on Facebook](http://facebook.com/VoteGeorgette)**

| Peter,
I think you'll agree that it's absolutely critical for us to all stand united together as Americans as we battle COVID-19.
That's why I'm disappointed to see that yet again, Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats have chosen partisanship over national unity.
They're politicizing this crisis and trying to stuff the coronavirus relief package full of their far-left priorities such as:
"Green New Deal" legislation Increased power to unions $35 million to the Kennedy Center $300 million to PBS
These things have nothing to do with helping Americans get through this time of need, and are aimed solely at advancing a partisan agenda.
Republicans understand that this is the wrong time for partisan politics.
---
| | | [STAND WITH US](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012mQ4xHdsdxJwveKPvflgT8ZCG3AyyDNHBTcz9YD3Baj4fLDKMvNIFUk2u46tsJ_FBiDtjoEGXEx74f9t6q-w8i_nKuL3CrPkZwGUKT4mbDq5eX6kuAFNSkMoQF7R4-aSBg2_wR4v3F7M2sjjbhFf-CopNdHy2zBcU8SRFs3txnY1peTiC2Vw2w==&c=eAM4M_L5qY40qx4JrwOgMiIp5nkM7_j8nlUNa6DRpuATszxlZIxUhA==&ch=q0CYTGR-hMWG5fRXvOCiT99fxF0PW6dcuq4Q_9lSiOn6CF2e40DIwg==)
---
| At a time when ordinary Americans are coming together to help one another and demonstrating each day what makes our country special, Washington Democrats are conducting business as usual.
I got into this race to win back this seat from a partisan politician, and it's times like these that reassure me we are on the right track.
[Join me now](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012mQ4xHdsdxJwveKPvflgT8ZCG3AyyDNHBTcz9YD3Baj4fLDKMvNIFUk2u46tsJ_FBiDtjoEGXEx74f9t6q-w8i_nKuL3CrPkZwGUKT4mbDq5eX6kuAFNSkMoQF7R4-aSBg2_wR4v3F7M2sjjbhFf-CopNdHy2zBcU8SRFs3txnY1peTiC2Vw2w==&c=eAM4M_L5qY40qx4JrwOgMiIp5nkM7_j8nlUNa6DRpuATszxlZIxUhA==&ch=q0CYTGR-hMWG5fRXvOCiT99fxF0PW6dcuq4Q_9lSiOn6CF2e40DIwg==) and let's show our unity, and take our district back.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Primary Day: June 2
body:
This morning, the Indiana Election Committee held a historic meeting (virtually, of course) and unanimously voted to echo Governor Holcomb's actions.. |
---
| |
---
| Indiana Republicans,

This morning, the Indiana Election Committee held a historic meeting (virtually, of course) and unanimously voted to echo Governor Holcomb's actions last week -- Indiana's primary is moved from **May 5 to June 2, 2020**.

With their unanimous vote, there are a few election updates we think you should be aware of --**including a change that allows any registered voter to vote via an absentee mail-in ballot. **
[\--> Click here for details on election updates <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6247aece21&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**If you scroll to the appendix of the linked document, you'll find the updated election calendar, which includes important deadlines and dates for Hoosier voters and candidates to watch, including:**
* **Monday, May 4:** Voter Registration Deadline
* **Tuesday, May 5:** Early Voting Begins In Person
* **Friday, May 8:** End of Pre-Primary Election Campaign Finance Reporting Period
* **Thursday, May 14:** Traveling Boards Begin
* **Thursday, May 21:** Deadline for a Request for an Absentee By-Mail Ballot to Be Received by the Clerk or Board of Elections and Registration
* **Sunday, May 31:** End of Pre-Primary Supplemental Campaign Finance Large Contribution Reporting Period
* **Monday, June 1:** Deadline for Traveling Boards & Noon Deadline for Early Voting
* **Tuesday, June 5:** Primary Day (noon is the deadline to return absentee ballots)

As we all come together to fight the coronavirus and flatten the curve, it's important to remember that we are all making sacrifices in our lives to keep Hoosiers across the state as healthy and safe as possible. However, COVID-19 should not stop anyone from exercising their right to vote!

Information on the coronavirus is changing rapidly and we'll continue to keep you updated as quickly as possible during these unique and challenging times! For the latest updates, please visit [in.gov/coronavirus](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=47a9715f8c&e=1acd9bb3d6).

-Your Indiana Republican Team

subject: Official Opening: Team Chase Store
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CLAIRE CHASE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
---

| Peter,

| | Peter,

We wanted to check in to make sure you saw the change in our race's rating from _Cook Political Report_.

In case you missed it, they just moved our race from "Likely Democratic" to "Lean Democratic" -- and Republicans are ecstatic.

They are working hard to flip this seat from blue to red -- **but we're working harder to hold onto this seat.**

**[Can you chip in today to help make this happen?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8f9/29776869/ae0a7f8/569fa3fe/2323108961/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjVfY29va3BvbGl0aWNhbGtpY2tlci1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_digipivot?refcode=em20_200325_cookpoliticalkicker-full")**

Thanks,

Team Christy

\-------------------------------Forwarded Message-------------------------------

From: Team Christy
Send time: March 21 at 10:32 am PST
Subject: Cook Political Report said...

Peter --

While there's a lot going on, we wanted to reach out with an important update on our run-off race:

**_Cook Political Report_ just changed our race rating from "Likely Democratic" to "Lean Democratic" -- a move that Republicans will be thrilled about.**

**[It's all hands on deck. We have less than 7 weeks to save this seat. Will you chip in now?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8f9/29776869/ae0a7f8/569fa3fe/2323108961/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjVfY29va3BvbGl0aWNhbGtpY2tlci1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_digipivot?refcode=em20_200325_cookpoliticalkicker-full")** [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8f9/29776869/ae0a7f8/569fa3fe/2323108961/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjVfY29va3BvbGl0aWNhbGtpY2tlci1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_digipivot?refcode=em20_200325_cookpoliticalkicker-full") _Cook_ 's primary reason for changing the rating on this race is that Republican donors love Mike Garcia and are ready to flip a California House seat from blue to red for the first time since 1998.

They're willing to pump a ton of national special interest money into this race to try and take back the House.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Real Representation
body:
We hired you to represent, so REPRESENT |
---
| |
---
| |
#
Last night, I held a Facebook Live town hall. From the moment this campaign began, I pledged to hold town halls in every community in this district – both as a part of my campaign and, when I’m elected, as a part of my service as Representative for IL-16.

We started town halls in January, and when the threat of COVID-19 made public gatherings seem risky, we moved our town halls to the internet, unwilling to sacrifice the immediate, critical work of talking to constituents, but unwilling, too, to sacrifice their safety.

Apparently, our incumbent Congressman held a community phone call this week – invitation only, with questions vetted in advance, and canned responses. It’s more than he’s done lately.**He hasn’t held a town hall in years. Hasn’t tried, in earnest, to represent the people of our shared district in any meaningful way in nearly a decade.**

I picked up the poster seen above at a conference or a rally years ago, and it has been hanging in my bedroom since. I think about it all the time now:_We Hired you to Represent. So Represent!_

The campaign continues even as the quarantine expands, and we still need your help. The town halls are an obvious illustration of why this district needs better representation.

Can you[ make a donation today to help us give the people of IL-16 the kind of representation they deserve?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=9cc31225b2&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
---

Dani for Illinois

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dean=20Browning?=
subject: Application for Mail-In Ballot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BROWNING FOR CONGRESS**
body:
|
---
| |
---
| ,

I hope you and your family are staying safe and healthy while our nation continues to deal with the coronavirus, also known as COVID-19.

**Considering everything that is happening, it is easy to lose sight of the upcoming elections.**

Currently, Pennsylvania has a Primary Election scheduled to take place in just five (5) weeks on Tuesday, April 28th.

However, to add to the uncertainty of the times, there is a strong likelihood that the Primary Election will be postponed to a later date.

It is reported that Tuesday, June 2nd could be the alternative election day, but no official date is set yet.

**However, regardless of when the Primary Election is held, Pennsylvania voters now have the option of casting their ballot by mail.
**
If you have any concern about you or anyone in your family going to your polling place, then I would strongly encourage you to vote by mail.

The process is easy and straightforward. Just click the button below to print out an application.
[Click here to print the application! ](https://browningfrocongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=69dc25bfa90bd52cf57d45ea0&id=f5f1d7d3f4&e=6800876418)
Once the application is completed, you will need to mail or deliver it to the Voter Registration office for your respective county.

Here is the list of addresses for each county in the PA-7th Congressional District as follows:
**Lehigh County Voter Registration**
17 S. 7th Street
Allentown, PA 18101-2401

**Monroe County Voter Registration**
One Quaker Plaza, Rm 105
Stroudsburg, PA 18360

**Northampton County Voter Registration**
670 Wolf Avenue
Easton, PA 18042
If you have any questions about this process, please immediately call me at 484-550-6550 or go to [www.votepa.com](https://browningfrocongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=69dc25bfa90bd52cf57d45ea0&id=d791411a40&e=6800876418).

Please remember to exercise your right to vote so your voice can be heard in the upcoming Primary Election.

**I would greatly appreciate your support, and with your help, we can return conservative grassroots representation in our nation’s capitol!**

I pray that Almighty God guides us through the current crisis and that He keeps you and your family safe and healthy.

**For Freedom,**
---
| |
---
| | **Dean Browning
Republican for Congress, PA-07**
---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://browningfrocongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=69dc25bfa90bd52cf57d45ea0&id=5a96710629&e=6800876418 "DONATE NOW!")
---

## Spicer&Co Update
---
| | I hope everyone is staying safe during this uncertain time. We are working hard at “Spicer&Co” to continue to bring you all the best information and insightful guests.

Today is National Medal of Honor Day. If you’re home today, especially if your kids are home with you, consider searching some of these hero’s and learn about their sacrifices. Tonight on “Spicer&Co” we will be joined by Major Will Swenson who was awarded the Medal of Honor for his actions at the Battle of Ganjgal in Afghanistan. Tune in to hear more about his story and the plans to build a National Museum of the Medal of Honor in Arlington, TX and a monument on the National Mall in Washington, DC. Find your channel [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3c7db468a9&e=f6564bbe3b).
---
| [ ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a8aad74298&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
Just under three years after leaving my role as White House press secretary, I returned to the briefing room for the coronavirus task force briefing on Friday - this time, on the other side of the podium— I just published an op-ed on TheHill.com about media’s reaction. Read it [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=0424d261c5&e=f6564bbe3b).
|
---
| | **Subscribe to my YouTube channel[here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=451277380c&e=f6564bbe3b), to catch up on interviews we’ve had in the past couple weeks including: [tips for children](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ce820a0d74&e=f6564bbe3b) that are out of school and at home because of the coronavirus, Bill Clinton's former press secretary [Mike McCurry](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=05d1daa13a&e=f6564bbe3b), and even a [discussion with our panel](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=2c00412289&e=f6564bbe3b) on killing time at home.**
---
| [ ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=513d17ba0e&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
We caught up with my former colleague and current White House Press Secretary, Stephanie Grisham about what it’s like to be in that role and how it’s changed from my term to hers.
| [ ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=fa8420db40&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
Got an office tour from John Gizzi, the Newsmax White House Correspondent featuring many Rolodexes.
| [ ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=56bf1a7685&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
We had US Surgeon General Dr. Jerome Adams on to help us debunk some of the misconceptions about coronavirus and explain best practices.
| Hope you guys have been enjoying, and stay safe.

Thanks,

_Sean_
---
|
---
|
---
|
---

name: Team MJ Hegar
subject: Big news (runoff extended)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Have you seen the news? Due to the COVID-19 pandemic the Texas Senate runoff has been extended from May 26th to July 14th.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903f2/7f51f7bc/4c32a8d9/4ef1d2ce/3096755664/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **BIG NEWS: RUNOFF EXTENDED TO July 14th
Help MJ win the runoff and defeat Sen. Cornyn in November!** **[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903f2/7f51f7bc/4c32a8d9/4ef1d2cd/3096755664/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200325.3nd__1117__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
---

Peter,

Have you seen the news? Due to the COVID-19 pandemic the Texas Senate runoff has been extended from May 26th to July 14th. This was absolutely the right call -- public health should come first. But it also means **we 're going to [need more resources](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903f2/7f51f7bc/4c32a8d9/4ef1d2cd/3096755664/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200325.3nd__1117__&amount=10&recurring=true") because:**
| ➔ | We'll have to maximize our runoff ads, mail, and digital organizing to reach voters ahead of the runoff
---|---|---
| ➔ | A shorter general election means we have to raise money NOW to be in the strongest position to take on Senator Cornyn
| ➔ | And since we can't do in-person events, online fundraising will be more important than ever
Look, I know this team is up to _any_ challenge, including this one. **Will you make your first* donation (only if you can)?**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Real leaders vs. the pundits
body:
A global crisis like the Coronavirus pandemic separates real leaders from the pundits. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c26bcbc65d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • March 25, 2020
---
| | |
# **Real leaders vs. the pundits**

**A global crisis** like the Coronavirus pandemic separates the real leaders from the pundits.

**Real leaders** know that every decision in Washington affects millions of Americans. Pundits, on the other hand, aren’t accountable to anyone except the media execs who sign their paychecks. They don’t have real jobs, so they don’t suffer when Democrats in Congress block a relief bill—or when politicians say it’s OK to shut down our entire economy indefinitely.

**President Trump** understands that when officials close down businesses to safeguard public health, there must be an ambitious recovery plan ready. Part one of that plan is immediate relief for millions of affected American workers. Part two is aggressive action to make sure America can open for business again the moment it is safe to do so.

**Part one** is nearly complete. Working late last night and into the early morning hours, Trump Administration officials and Senate lawmakers came together on a deal. “The legislation developed in the Senate is the first step to restoring confidence and stability to America’s economy,” the President said yesterday.

🎬 **Larry Kudlow:** [“This legislation is urgently needed to bolster the economy.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c6f50f5508&e=3ee4985eea)

**The next step** is preparing to get America back to work as soon as possible. Once again, the pundit class lined up to attack common sense—they say it’s too soon to even think about how our economy recovers once the threat passes.

**Easy for them** to say, of course. A mass quarantine doesn’t risk their paychecks, their families’ futures, or their ability to retire the same way it threatens millions of small businesses and workers. Most pundits don’t know what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck; they don’t have to fear not being able to put food on the table.

**Leaders, however** , don’t have the “luxury of being one-dimensional,” as Gov. Andrew Cuomo (D-NY) said this week. Public health is essential, but “we also have to start to plan the pivot back to economic functionality. You can't stop the economy forever.”

🎬 **President Trump:** [The best thing for our economy is victory over this virus](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f64ef1a2c0&e=3ee4985eea)

**Gov. Cuomo** [**also thanked President Trump**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=733b735350&e=3ee4985eea) and his team for their full cooperation and creative private-sector involvement during the outbreak. As President Trump says, bipartisan cooperation right now is crucial to get every American the support they need.

**America’s future** shines bright. [No country on Earth](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f8857d1827&e=3ee4985eea) is better prepared to handle this pandemic than we are. We will beat this virus together. And when we do, our economy will pick up right where it left off—with high wages, job growth, and rising 401(k)s.

**Maybe that’s what** the pundits are really worried about.

[“List: 74 actions taken by Trump to fight virus and bolster economy”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7520b687dd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **🎥****Together, we will prevail!**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b2bf90e1ca&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **The American people** are showing each day that unity and resolve define our nation.

**“In the selfless actions** of our amazing citizens, we’re seeing enduring strength of our magnificent nation, a spirit that can never be broken, and a victorious future that can never be denied,” President Trump said.

**Incredible stories** keep rolling in from across America that prove the point:
* **Kids in** **New York**[“paint rainbows to help spread cheer”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ffb0617e8c&e=3ee4985eea)

* **WATCH:** [Calif. National Guard loads boxes for local food bank](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=28a0bcafb0&e=3ee4985eea)

* **Florida distillery** [“produces free hand sanitizer”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=69eb68fd86&e=3ee4985eea)

* **North Carolina waitress** [“was ‘perfect person’ for this random act of kindness”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=787f7de21b&e=3ee4985eea)

**MUST READ:** [“As Coronavirus sweeps the nation, Americans come through with endless acts of kindness”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0dd314ba73&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump, Vice President Pence, and members of the Coronavirus Task Force brief the press in the James S. Brady Press Briefing Room** | March 24, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=25abd07dc7&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b36f6a3b7d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=516d5bbbba)
---

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana: how you can help Hoosiers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
We need to do this together — as Hoosiers. Keeping Hoosiers healthy will require every single one of us to be all-in. Friend,

Keeping Hoosiers healthy will require every single one of us to be all-in.
**We need to do this together — as Hoosiers. **
Eric is all in. That’s why he continues to update us daily and explain why we all need to hunker down at home. And that’s why he’s been working around the clock, doing everything in his power to help those affected by this pandemic that at the same time is global...and local.
And we need your help. So, for this week’s One Indiana, we compiled a list of ways that you can help your community. Check out our list below and please help your community through this crisis in any way that you can.
* **Donate blood -** our medical professionals desperately need your help to fight back against COVID-19, and donating blood is a great way to help address an immediate need. Find out where you can give using this link: **[https://www.redcrossblood.org/give](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=5063cd97dc1f45a69d08514f2b669949&_e=UhkRv2Ko4iXwZ9JM82ld2RExoFOVAHktQFFw4JF1enJPmb2bG8UURxTK69ljJ6xEOwOsThFDBEth-4KsfcFjReMpQuSPJksWyoAXxQft9EN--iIZHA7J9GdYQnkLvVQO2wu5Ln37cGCX3VtUAoCxNwc6QbpuYtLtnB3Y84BUc_wLF9a789pnwHMQ5Nd8iRriS6pvxgefa6mIQ7SnVNocm2-Ks1JzidJtzQ7oAHvEc8S8xwH_3F057y2Ox81PxqyWpA_2OnSouULB6PI34u-aZhq_VQ6l72UIfyLZKjRdzHiPoO7hkyyck9SWvfjlqHcUcNXB8B8SFiud4B38HSLJM4C5WhKYVU0ks9ZPvyU7ESmw4KOWFjLewTfJVo9GsRN5qPKQNobA1DX-MK_NFwVmAzVCcZAI9MbPa2U6wvytVFMZYp2uBtWnJlnZR7E8pJ4gxunJYGQ3UGu6axJeAlUWXzBWVuL9-uXROVAZ_1XbixOVyvihn3iRQdAJ4OrmTYZsS8Jx19JC-IExYE1VW0wsB49PwbZ7Bsh305Pd0QnTcTdPYf9-YsxeYgnGC0HSLmEUbZm_0KqNZQkZAMu4WpdjYQ%3D%3D)**
* **Order take out -** help support local restaurants by ordering your favorite takeout dish!
* **Social distance -** please follow the guidelines issued by the **[CDC](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=5063cd97dc1f45a69d08514f2b669949&_e=UhkRv2Ko4iXwZ9JM82ld2VsTYc2Aq9IudKOW5zRrkuEo0iEj9FS-UsjkMOOZiRmTC2NK5iSEG1BjtiCjelD1_S5VHRmQZFCTrHGKHVElFFOeLCY8MQ4xOPpS4GEtAav_RJdDzY8iI7ZfGrxjwMkiuk3NSw6JFxjqYDGruPtODm3S3dOJs0GxN8oEBLQ2oHzNYs2iG0rfJSVlK-lrFYoZanNKc8vziplEjDEvlIGyVsBXDgD5hmgAZiNU6WRm4571nqlI0pHYqOFB7YEKYBuXJrTwdvN3UJ1IQZu8SIXHFu3jg28vsEkev6nmKmU4lcXJc2dzRYEeopKYI7GSljpCotsh7TIqjg5nkrymrfItKoBBDLvtGg8ZdX7Hjec3pZNT5uiP05tESZ82fHLPOwfvfzKOF6TF-f6q1leKsYSiVIv4XFN6JrEHQCvvfD1N0-Ue).** This is a crucial part of containing the disease and ‘flattening the curve.’
* **Stay home -** only go out if you need to exercise, walk your pet, get groceries, go to a pharmacy, or get medical attention.** **
* **Wash your hands -** you’ve heard this one before,**but it’s extremely important to regularly wash your hands with soap and water for at least 20 seconds.**
* **Buy gift cards -** buying gift cards to local restaurants and retailers is a good way to give these businesses cash flow now, which they can use to pay employees and keep their lights on. You can use them to celebrate once their doors re-open!
* **Donate to charities -** food banks, homeless shelters, and other charitable organizations are the frontlines of the fight against coronavirus.
* **Call your friends and family -** social distancing doesn’t mean isolation. It’s more important than ever to stay close with the ones you love.** **
* **Share reliable information from trusted sources -** like the **[Indiana State Health Department](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=5063cd97dc1f45a69d08514f2b669949&_e=UhkRv2Ko4iXwZ9JM82ld2UnJWgOI4ftRLqUNa2AbutZmg4st21O8IVs2C_ARk3nFUCOy2ZaOlqb5y8KGvUuxi9mRIZbZu41M3qBe-SHUB9t2JGZ5K9CBJyLfh7YOaoi3dsk8FOK0pMImo9BZTjqSXKeEiFe3p0rJs_r6xnuIleq9mbH1yQwyYb7TzHGqiqi4dvi54L9ZsK0l_LQBGU77PZc-qAvSoHAaugz64jBnNJIaqYDTEtHdGV6E_7e20ONkK5MSz7n3peKgpGU2TuWAlFjYnNsgq2Wau3nLj6k5tiTEpUrlO1i_RC9Pylm64KhQM3gRQdwGdKBJz8BmCW-5m7E7o7aJt-NYG7uqFp2EjniTkvxRR592uh-ggWEi0Z9v)** or the **[CDC](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=5063cd97dc1f45a69d08514f2b669949&_e=UhkRv2Ko4iXwZ9JM82ld2VsTYc2Aq9IudKOW5zRrkuEo0iEj9FS-UsjkMOOZiRmTC2NK5iSEG1BjtiCjelD1_S5VHRmQZFCTrHGKHVElFFOeLCY8MQ4xOPpS4GEtAav_RJdDzY8iI7ZfGrxjwMkiuk3NSw6JFxjqYDGruPtODm3S3dOJs0GxN8oEBLQ2oHzNYs2iG0rfJSVlK-lrFYoZanNKc8vziplEjDEvlIGyVsBQAUP3XaGnVb3f5yXyF2mKJw-jlRuaTbDuplEsSlPg80syYCBn--OOIMSbSHu4Smb-zExqW5TaWJVGCEyl3Q5PSgeq_GniPw8uoqZ2AevK4-Ck-T_C4vu2c4zhlSNVhmxbteVQXSZPPH0EF-UlNogbtEFN4Q_wrJdkFROEvY8ddPntEWWTl7CudKA676UXTE3kW8gPO2cYG2VmrHtk2slN).**
* **If you or your business have or can produce medical supplies, reach out at[covidresponse@iedc.in.gov](mailto:covidresponse@iedc.in.gov)**
* **Consider making sewn face masks at home for our health care workers on the front lines - [https://www.deaconess.com/How-to-make-a-Face-Mask](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=5063cd97dc1f45a69d08514f2b669949&_e=UhkRv2Ko4iXwZ9JM82ld2bo4_HwHWalDNIOxI2a8WZwI6Re9_6WAzoIV3gnfXbhKOII0C-rmHKhzNRMrmDrTYoKgEQKnd8jExOOLAbyNrhBi_Q4yvQLeNsTZf0-A7jI8hCwuGjFInVyJwxl-7Ojon0PImfOdjmEe1x-T0Vt6DrHkmN02zIijt5yS8fC8uUfirZGtQ6CiWw9OljD1-Fz7xBmndzT84v6DcfH3tvkcDMlZ86kl3Z0StrN9Y6VRUnCp_RyBRC9fpXLr5QVljv24e-7sh6KO8omjLY5HsIv-g4lURz-cpilxXSLgEsgPjaVKkzbzWa7P0nwDclmS_EUwKjFWGjcB2TRkLSDOpEcnaL8Raoyxsz440kffcJWNRL-KDWpByL8BcPML3HPGY74OxUR-Q8U70OQRxWetx66kq4Y%3D)**

**We all need to do our part. **
If you want the latest information, please visit **[Indiana State Department of Health’s website.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=5063cd97dc1f45a69d08514f2b669949&_e=UhkRv2Ko4iXwZ9JM82ld2UnJWgOI4ftRLqUNa2AbutZmg4st21O8IVs2C_ARk3nFUCOy2ZaOlqb5y8KGvUuxi9mRIZbZu41M3qBe-SHUB9t2JGZ5K9CBJyLfh7YOaoi3dsk8FOK0pMImo9BZTjqSXKeEiFe3p0rJs_r6xnuIleoDWLwGI-tPGXc3DcRvyygw98CFoSW4e2Xhff_N-ULhMCJSTO1pY9R8p39FYUhJbHi2dQadGBNoUf2gJa9MMcemyAOCYo3BZP3aXfm27w_EJOXFfSbvES4DNZ-Jq4VD6qShvCMWJVHZZZUlt0wnQ92cDc0rrXI64m4YK_wqrcNFdzuHKt-cAdlz-7KL5X0FcGpvDNRwmMNMNlbCuKjjTj0d)** Thanks,

clean_body: We need to do this together — as Hoosiers. Keeping Hoosiers healthy will require every single one of us to be all-in. Friend, Keeping Hoosiers healthy will require every single one of us to be all-in. We need to do this together — as Hoosiers. Eric is all in. That’s why he continues to update us daily and explain why we all need to hunker down at home. And that’s why he’s been working around the clock, doing everything in his power to help those affected by this pandemic that at the same time is global...and local. And we need your help. So, for this week’s One Indiana, we compiled a list of ways that you can help your community. Check out our list below and please help your community through this crisis in any way that you can. Donate blood - our medical professionals desperately need your help to fight back against COVID-19, and donating blood is a great way to help address an immediate need. Find out where you can give using this link: Order take out - help support local restaurants by ordering your favorite takeout dish! Social distance - please follow the guidelines issued by the . This is a crucial part of containing the disease and ‘flattening the curve.’ Stay home - only go out if you need to exercise, walk your pet, get groceries, go to a pharmacy, or get medical attention. Wash your hands - you’ve heard this one before,but it’s extremely important to regularly wash your hands with soap and water for at least 20 seconds. Buy gift cards - buying gift cards to local restaurants and retailers is a good way to give these businesses cash flow now, which they can use to pay employees and keep their lights on. You can use them to celebrate once their doors re-open! Donate to charities - food banks, homeless shelters, and other charitable organizations are the frontlines of the fight against coronavirus. Call your friends and family - social distancing doesn’t mean isolation. It’s more important than ever to stay close with the ones you love. Share reliable information from trusted sources - like the or the . If you or your business have or can produce medical supplies, reach out atmailto:covidresponse@iedc.in.gov Consider making sewn face masks at home for our health care workers on the front lines - We all need to do our part. If you want the latest information, please visit ** Thanks, -Holcomb Crew | | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. name: Reverend Warnock
subject: Rare opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
An opportunity like this may not come again.
| | |
---
This isn't looking good for our campaign, friend.
After a Trump-linked super PAC named this state one of its TOP targets of the election cycle, my wealthy Republican opponent started spending $20 MILLION of her own fortune to try and buy this seat.
Republicans are coming after me with everything they've got. **And now, analysts at _The Washington Post_ say that if we lose in Georgia, Democrats have no chance of taking back the Senate from Mitch McConnell.**
**That's why this news is so incredible: A group of generous donors just committed to MATCH all donations - dollar for dollar - to help us hit our $50,000 end****-of-quarter FEC goal! ****[Please, friend, will you give $5 or more right now- $5 becomes $10 - to have your donation DOUBLED so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk90-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
Friend, I grew up in public housing in Savannah. If you'd told _me -_ a poor kid with 11 brothers and sisters - that one day I'd run for U.S. Senate, I would've never believed you. But here I am today, running to become the first black senator that Georgia has _ever_ elected. The American dream is possible, and my story is proof.
But right now, Mitch McConnell and the GOP are working hard to put the American dream out of reach for far too many hardworking people across our country. So I'll be frank: It's never been more important for Democrats to win back Senate control. **Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight _says we can - but ONLY if we win here in Georgia.**
**That's why I'm counting on you to take advantage of this rare opportunity to have your dollar go _twice_ as far in our fight to take back the Senate and end McConnell's majority once and for all. ****We don't know when - or _if _- another incredible offer like this will come around again, so I have to ask:**
**[Will you donate $5 or more right now- as much as you can afford - to have your donation DOUBLED to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats? Every single dollar could mean the difference between winning and losing.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk90-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Mississippi Coronavirus Update - March 25, 2020
body:
What new laws do you think the Mississippi legislature should consider?|
---|---
| | |
---
| | [](https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/mjfPWlMGyPtw6AwAHdiut_hxyO5g4h7weC-5Cj_C8b1RZKJsoCJ7YlwHqasES8CSaAFVBZ8T3F2e-9VbdMPyu21bKDy2kPpJD_DX-sJboFQadDLE4SdTTv5MPS50HuNXGCWI_jpz7cCaM1Mh2q1TzX32QZOjJfT9A_SV11LkMYG_rmfOmZOpv-PT)
---
| | | |
---
**Mississippi Coronavirus Update
March 25, 2020**
| |
---
| | | |
---
Date: March 25, 2020
Re: COVID-19 March 25 Update 1\. Executive Order. As you may know, the Governor entered a lengthy executive order yesterday. It is five pages long, so I will attempt to summarize it for you. **First, let me tell you what the executive order DOES NOT do:**
• It DOES NOT include any “shelter in place” or “home confinement.”
• It DOES NOT include any statewide (or other) “lock down.”
• It DOES NOT prevent any business from operating. It simply requires nonessential businesses and other persons to not have more than 10 people gathered in close proximity. The categories of “Essential Business or Operations” are broad and are listed below. However, every business must implement reasonable social distancing measures and send sick employees home. **Now I will tell you what the order DOES do:**
• Until April 17, 2020, Mississippi residents shall avoid gatherings of more than 10 people in a single space in close proximity to each other. This does not apply to normal operations of airports, health care facilities, retail and grocery stores, manufacturing facilities or any other “Essential Business or Operation.”
• Until April 17, 2020, restaurants and bars shall suspend dine-in service unless they can serve less than 10 people in a single space in close proximity. Use of drive through and carryout service is encouraged.
• Until April 17, 2020, there is a prohibition against visits to hospitals, nursing and retirement homes unless it is needed to provide critical assistance or in end-of-life situations. Even those types of visits are prohibited if they are not safe as determined by the facility’s supervising health care professional. Electronic visits (Skype, Face-time, etc.) are encouraged.
• Recommends that, to the maximum extent feasible, businesses and non-profits utilize work-from-home or telework rather than in-person work.
• Essential Businesses or Operations include:
\- Government functions including public safety, law enforcement, emergency management, courts, etc.
\- Health care operations
\- Infrastructure, including utilities, fuel, telecommunications, suppliers and distributors, cybersecurity operations, transportation facilities, mass transit, vehicle rental, taxis and ride sharing (Uber/Lyft), rail, water systems, waste disposal, hotels and lodging, etc. \- Manufacturing
\- Agriculture
\- Retail including supermarkets, food and beverage stores, convenience stores, pharmacies, hardware/building materials stores, gas stations, restaurants and bars (subject to prior limitations of the order)
\- Trash collection, mail/shipping, home repair, auto repair and sales, laundry services
\- Communications media
\- Educators for purposes of facilitating distance learning or delivery of free/reduced meals
\- Financial services
\- Professional services including legal, accounting, insurance and real estate (including appraisal and title)
\- Providers of basic necessities to the poor
\- Construction and construction related services
\- Safety, sanitation, fire prevention, security services
\- Defense Industrial Base services supporting the military
\- Vendors providing essential services, such as logistics and tech support
\- Religious entities, provided they adhere to CDC and Department of Health (DOH) guidelines
\- IT workers identified by Dept. of Homeland Security as Essential
\- Other categories determined essential by MDOH, MEMA and/or any other appropriate state agency.
• “Essential Businesses or Operations” are not subject to the 10-person limit nor any other limit other than what is in the Executive Order.
• The Order explicitly suspends any municipal ordinance that is inconsistent with the Order insofar as Essential Businesses or Operations are concerned.
• Essential Businesses are required to take all reasonable measures to comply with CDC and MDOH guidelines, such as social distancing and sending sick employees home or requiring them to stay home.
**HOW the Order will be enforced:**
• Pursuant to Miss. Code Section 33-15-1 et seq., state and local emergency management officials can arrest violators who will be subject to up to a $500 fine and up to 6 months imprisonment.
| [Continue Reading](https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/WNoqnM-0ZQgrQxc2eUtrKoDhHmmKJq51XoZLaClCwzV-0hIXyFtG2cU6zolOPRRhirI2gmiHf_v-k9n6cC6vPNEeM0ZtYam5TvriPKOke8W-ivehgrS_kx8Z-iJb_9a3kVCHcYmMZByMmDqRgs1gaCFV6Z7mf-EctYmeGKoYvor27V4yZt-epXgZjNOYeGb8-cbT6kT6B7_mQPLYA-FkUAxzihBtVWYZj0N22JN80xqBTLdRcOzxcQk)
